const data = { "metadata": { "exported": "2026-04-19T08:27:12.947Z", "totalBugs": 1302, "projects": [ "BT" ], "jiraInstance": "hibob.atlassian.net" }, "bugs": [ { "key": "BT-13274", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Agent Companion - Skills loaded incorrectly into Claude SDK (wrong path, combined file, broken frontmatter)", "status": "Not Started", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Omri Bitan", "reporter": "Omri Bitan", "created": "2026-04-19T11:13:44.441+0300", "updated": "2026-04-19T11:14:54.697+0300", "createdDate": "4/19/2026", "updatedDate": "4/19/2026", "daysOpen": 1, "leadingTeam": "AI Dev", "system": "Other", "sprint": "PI3.26.Sprint 1 (30/3 -27/4)", "description": "Bug DescriptionThe Agent Companion skill loading implementation does not follow the Claude Agent SDK standard for skills. This causes skills to be discovered incorrectly, shows internal server filesystem paths to users in the UI, and potentially loads wrong/stale skills across agents.Root Cause AnalysisThree separate issues were identified in backend/services/agent_companion/claude/config.py (_handle_skill_file function):1. All skills combined into a single SKILL.md file (breaks SDK discovery)The current code loads all skills from S3 and concatenates them with --- separators into one SKILL.md file:combined_skills = '\\n\\n---\\n\\n'.join(all_skills_content)Problem: The Claude SDK expects each skill in its own directory (~/.claude/skills/{skill-name}/SKILL.md), each with its own YAML frontmatter containing name and description. The --- separator is the YAML frontmatter delimiter, so combining skills this way destroys the YAML frontmatter of all skills except the first one. The SDK sees one mega-skill instead of individual skills.SDK Standard: Each skill must be in its own directory:.claude/skills/\n data-visualization/\n SKILL.md\n data-querying/\n SKILL.md2. Path mismatch between skill write path and SDK cwd (skills not found or wrong skills loaded)_handle_skill_file writes skills using os.path.realpath(project_name) where project_name is the agent name (e.g., snowflake-oauth), producing a path like: ~/.claude/skills/-app-backend-snowflake-oauth/SKILL.mdBut create_claude_options sets the SDK's cwd to project_name which is assistant_ui (a different variable). The SDK discovers project-level skills relative to cwd, so these two paths never match.This is also environment-dependent: os.path.realpath('snowflake-oauth') produces completely different paths on local dev vs Docker container vs ECS.3. Cross-agent skill contaminationSkills are written to ~/.claude/skills/ (user-level) and setting_sources includes user. User-level skills are global -- the SDK loads ALL user skills regardless of which agent is active. Agent A's skills are visible to Agent B.ImpactUsers see internal server filesystem paths (e.g., /home/appuser/.claude/skills/-app-backend-snowflake-oauth) in the chat UI when skills are invokedSkills may not load at all due to path mismatchSkills from one agent may leak into another agent's sessionOnly the first skill's YAML frontmatter is visible to Claude for auto-discoveryAll skill content loads at once instead of lazily per-skillFix Plan (Option 1: Project-scoped skills)Deterministic per-agent cwd: Use ~/.claude/agent-workspaces/{agent_project_name} as the SDK cwdOne directory per skill: Write each S3 skill to {cwd}/.claude/skills/{skill-name}/SKILL.md with original YAML frontmatter intactProject-only setting source: Change setting_sources from ['user', 'project'] to ['project']Stale skill cleanup: Before writing, remove old skill directories not in current skills-config.jsonFiles to Changebackend/services/agent_companion/claude/config.py - Rewrite _handle_skill_file, fix cwd in create_claude_optionsbackend/services/agent_companion/claude/message_processor.py - Verify SKILL_CONTENT_INDICATORS still match new paths.cursor/skills/agent-companion-structure/SKILL.md - Update documentationEnvironmentAffects both dev and production (Docker container running as appuser with CWD /app/backend)." }, { "key": "BT-13264", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Gap between FOC period to Period 1", "status": "Not Started", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2026-04-16T18:15:35.864+0300", "updated": "2026-04-19T09:14:00.826+0300", "createdDate": "4/16/2026", "updatedDate": "4/19/2026", "daysOpen": 3, "leadingTeam": "MIS - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10510", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Subscription validation failrues after add employer ID ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Moti Gorsky", "reporter": "Matan Shachaf", "created": "2026-01-18T21:09:17.893+0200", "updated": "2026-02-12T07:17:19.932+0200", "createdDate": "1/18/2026", "updatedDate": "2/12/2026", "daysOpen": 91, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-10501", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Bug in Workato Function: AI Notion ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ilay Reshef", "reporter": "Ilay Reshef", "created": "2026-01-18T16:10:04.060+0200", "updated": "2026-01-21T15:10:46.916+0200", "createdDate": "1/18/2026", "updatedDate": "1/21/2026", "daysOpen": 91, "description": "The current Workato recipe logic contains a data mapping error in the Update Issue in Jira step. The \"Notion Link\" field is currently hardcoded to pull the URL datapill exclusively from Step 17 (the \"IF\" branch).\n\nWhen the recipe logic follows the \"ELSE\" branch (Step 19), Step 17 is skipped. Consequently, the datapill from Step 17 remains null, causing the Jira update to either fail or post an empty link." }, { "key": "BT-10493", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - To remove script of VAT in welfare GL account", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2026-01-18T14:10:02.133+0200", "updated": "2026-01-18T16:44:05.247+0200", "createdDate": "1/18/2026", "updatedDate": "1/18/2026", "daysOpen": 91, "description": "Request Summary:To remove script of VAT in welfare GL account Email address:lilia.levin@hibob.ioPriority:HighYour Team:FinanceFinance Team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:TaxInvolved Systems:NetsuiteAdditional Details:Please remove script that rans in back a round that remove VAT tax to non claimable———————————————This task was submitted through BT - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10463", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Incorrect invoice - INVUK124552", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ilay Reshef", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2026-01-16T23:13:53.215+0200", "updated": "2026-01-25T16:07:10.619+0200", "createdDate": "1/16/2026", "updatedDate": "1/25/2026", "daysOpen": 93, "description": "Email address:anne.meier@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Incorrect invoice - INVUK124552Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Billing & CollectionFinance Area:BillingBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:The quantity on the prorated invoice (INVUK124552) is incorrect for Sandbox and Workforce Planning.The customer has tiered pricing and the quantity on the second tiered pricing is incorrect for both modules.Expected Behavior:To prorate the quantity on all tiered pricing.Actual Behavior:Only prorated the quantity for the first tier priceIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/accounting/transactions/custinvc.nl?id=9146391&whence=———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10442", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Error found in Auto Provisioning process in NetSuite", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ilay Reshef", "reporter": "Ilay Reshef", "created": "2026-01-15T10:39:06.876+0200", "updated": "2026-01-15T15:28:51.589+0200", "createdDate": "1/15/2026", "updatedDate": "1/15/2026", "daysOpen": 94, "description": "Automated role provisioning is currently failing on Employee records due to two distinct script errors in the handleProvisioning function of the HBN.UE.Entity.Form.Admin.js script. These errors prevent the correct assignment/revocation of roles and impact the RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) automation.Error Breakdown1. Invalid Search Column (SSS_INVALID_SRCH_COL)Occurrence: 15/01/2026 9:05 amLocation: getRoleMatrix function (line 228)Root Cause: The search is attempting to reference a column custrecord_hb_pm_bob_sub_department that either does not exist on the custom record customrecord_hb_provisioning_matrix or is misspelled.Evidence:\"message\": \"An nlobjSearchColumn contains an invalid column... custrecord_hb_pm_bob_sub_department.\"2. Invalid API Usage (SSS_INVALID_API_USAGE)Occurrence: 14/01/2026 7:05 amLocation: handleProvisioning function (line 94)Root Cause: The script is calling rec.getText() on a field that has just been modified via rec.setValue() within the same beforeSubmit execution. In NetSuite, when a value is set in memory during beforeSubmit, you must use getValue to retrieve it, as the \"text\" (display name) has not yet been committed to the database.Evidence:\"message\": \"Invalid API usage. You must use getValue to return the value set with setValue.\"" }, { "key": "BT-10438", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Clean Exhausted Fields on Nurture", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shlomi Kapuya", "reporter": "Ben Ben-David", "created": "2026-01-15T09:54:24.182+0200", "updated": "2026-02-01T09:43:24.123+0200", "createdDate": "1/15/2026", "updatedDate": "2/1/2026", "daysOpen": 95, "description": "To support multi-cycle tracking:\n\nWe need to clean (set to 0) the following fields - \n\nOutbound_Call_Connections__c \nNumber_Of_Engaged_Contacts__c \nOutbound_Emails__c \nLinkedIn_Touches__c" }, { "key": "BT-10435", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - waterfall - diff in arr and in active EE between production current run and history run", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2026-01-14T18:42:54.211+0200", "updated": "2026-02-16T13:32:01.078+0200", "createdDate": "1/14/2026", "updatedDate": "2/16/2026", "daysOpen": 95, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-10419", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Customer: 97764 Technetix Ltdhttps://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/common/entity/custjob.nl?id=1224180&siaT=1767879097411&siaWhc=%2Fapp%2Fcenter%2Fcard.nl&siaPs=0&siaPfx=&siaQ=+Technetix+Ltd&siaNv=gsIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/common/entity/custjob.nl?id=1224180&siaT=1767879097411&siaWhc=%2Fapp%2Fcenter%2Fcard.nl&siaPs=0&siaPfx=&siaQ=+Technetix+Ltd&siaNv=gs———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10290", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Issue with Dealhub google sheet uplaod", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Dan Gorelik", "created": "2026-01-08T15:18:36.618+0200", "updated": "2026-01-11T10:15:14.092+0200", "createdDate": "1/8/2026", "updatedDate": "1/11/2026", "daysOpen": 101, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-10287", "project": "BT", "summary": "Refactor Account Scheduler Daily Flow + No Activity issue", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yuval Matus", "reporter": "Yuval Matus", "created": "2026-01-08T14:29:17.041+0200", "updated": "2026-01-12T16:22:17.633+0200", "createdDate": "1/8/2026", "updatedDate": "1/12/2026", "daysOpen": 101, "description": "🧾 DescriptionThe Account Scheduler Flow runs daily and includes several processes, one of which is intended to revert prospect accounts (in the SMB and Micro segments) to \"nurture\" if there has been no activity within the last 60 days from the MQA date. This specific process is currently not functioning as expected, Accounts meeting the criteria are not being reverted.In addition, the flow still contains logic referencing the 6sense integration, which is no longer in use. As 6sense has been sunset, all related processes must be removed from the scheduler.💼 Business ImpactThe failure of this process leads to stale prospect accounts remaining in active status, affecting sales prioritization, outreach effectiveness, and reporting accuracy. Retaining deprecated 6sense logic adds unnecessary complexity and potential confusion for admins maintaining the flow.🔍 Expected BehaviorThe process within the Account Scheduler Flow should correctly identify prospect accounts in the SMB and Micro segments that have had no activity for 60 days since the MQA date and revert them to \"nurture\" status.All processes or conditions referencing the 6sense integration should be fully removed from the flow.🛠️ Suggested FixUpdate entry criteria: Remove all 6sense references and ensure the scheduler flow still supports all remaining processes.Remove 6sense outcomes: Delete any flow logic, branches, or actions tied to 6sense.Fix “No activity in last 60 days” process: Adjust its entry criteria and ensure the process executes correctly for SMB and Micro for prospect accounts.Test: Validate changes with sample accounts to confirm expected behavior." }, { "key": "BT-10254", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Ability to open Commission dispute cases", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Idan Brand", "reporter": "Lizi Levin", "created": "2026-01-07T18:18:55.836+0200", "updated": "2026-01-08T09:57:08.027+0200", "createdDate": "1/7/2026", "updatedDate": "1/8/2026", "daysOpen": 102, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-10253", "project": "BT", "summary": "Not able to submit an amendment quote HB-135398", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Guy Levin", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2026-01-07T17:50:26.087+0200", "updated": "2026-01-11T13:30:06.659+0200", "createdDate": "1/7/2026", "updatedDate": "1/11/2026", "daysOpen": 102, "description": "Request Summary:Not able to submit an amendment quote HB-135398Email address:dor.blum@hibob.ioPriority:HighYour Team:FinanceFinance Team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQInvolved Systems:DealhubAdditional Details:Discussed this wiith Guy, I need to update the UK payroll EEs and one of the MGS liines to 430 and downsell the two other MGS lines as they are identical. I get the error that the total number of EEs from all UK Payroll sites cannot exceed the number of Min EEs specified in the contract.https://hibob--dealhub.vf.force.com/apex/DealHub?param=CreateQuoteFromOpp&OpportunityId=006Vg00000R1dCgIAJ&isdtp=mn———————————————This task was submitted through BT - Receive an email in the Billing inbox that contains two relevant tags2. Observe that Workato correctly opens a task for the first tag3. After completing the first task, check whether Workato opens a second task for the second tagExpected Behavior:Workato should detect each tag independently and open a separate task for each one - meaning a second task should automatically be created once the first is processedActual Behavior:Only the first tag triggers a task.No second task is created, and the automation stops after the first task, even though a second tag is presentIs there an available workaround?:YesPlease describe the workaround (steps):Manually update the information in the system———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Salesforce roles conflict with Dealhub discount approval policy", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Idan Brand", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2026-01-05T15:32:43.453+0200", "updated": "2026-01-18T09:56:41.278+0200", "createdDate": "1/5/2026", "updatedDate": "1/18/2026", "daysOpen": 104, "description": "Email address:dennis.kaluzhni@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Salesforce roles conflict with Dealhub discount approval policyYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:Compliance Business Priority:HighBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Salesforce roles associated to users, can download a report :SELECTUser_Full_Name__c, Username,Profile.Name,UserRole.Name,IsActive,LastLoginDate,CreatedDate,CreatedBy.NameFROM Userwhere isactive=trueExpected Behavior:I expect the Bob Title of employees to match their role in Salesforce that affect the discount policy in DealHubActual Behavior:There are some groups of users that are associated to roles that have higher permissions to approve discounts in DealHub.ROLE= Nordics Sales Team 3 AE contains 6 people that are in bob \"Associate Account Executive\", which means they should approve up to 5% and can do 10%. Same for ROLE = AU AE Team 2, that has 4 people, and ROLE = DACH Sales Team 1 that has 3 people.ROLE = US Sales Manager Associate AE has one employee that is defined as a \"Sales Manager\" in Bob but in SFDC and DH can approve discounts on the same level as regional managers.There are also 2 instances with low risk, just FYI where people should be able to approve higher discounts but are placed lower in the workflow. These include deja.ademi@hibob.io that has the \"UK Sales Team 5 Associate AE\" role (but in Bob the employee is \"Account Executive\" (not associate).And damien.andreasen@hibob.io which is VP Sales, APJ in Bob but is associated to the AU Sales Director role which is in the level of Regional Manager (instead of VP level). Again - those 2 have no risk from my point of view.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:Refer to attached file, tab 'NB - Subscription'———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10176", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Risk Indicator on Missed Payment was not created", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shiran Guberman", "reporter": "Menash Mizrahi", "created": "2026-01-05T14:25:46.625+0200", "updated": "2026-01-27T14:31:44.875+0200", "createdDate": "1/5/2026", "updatedDate": "1/27/2026", "daysOpen": 104, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-10174", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Add 'on edit' trigger to invoice pdf sync from NestSuite to Sales Force", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ilay Reshef", "reporter": "Ilay Reshef", "created": "2026-01-05T14:01:39.636+0200", "updated": "2026-02-08T17:05:32.837+0200", "createdDate": "1/5/2026", "updatedDate": "2/8/2026", "daysOpen": 104, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-10169", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Customer is not able to see the Sandbox toggle in their account", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2026-01-05T13:33:02.950+0200", "updated": "2026-01-18T21:06:27.940+0200", "createdDate": "1/5/2026", "updatedDate": "1/18/2026", "daysOpen": 104, "description": "Email address:sima.kovarsky@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Customer is not able to see the Sandbox toggle in their accountYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:NoSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Hi Team,I processed a module start date change for the Sandbox module for customer Clinisys, Inc. The original start date was 01/04/25 (their renewal date), and I updated it to 01/01/26.However, the customer still can’t see the Sandbox toggle in their account, even though the new start date has already passed.I checked the customer’s environment and noticed that:-The Sandbox module status is “Pending On” instead of “On”-The Module Start Date doesn’t appear to be updated there correctly.Since I don’t usually edit this field directly, I wanted to check:-Can I safely update the Module Start Date myself to resolve this?-Or is there another step required to activate the module for a customer who is already paying for it?Thanks for your help.Expected Behavior:Sandbox module status should be On and the Module Start Date should be 1/1/26.Actual Behavior:Sandbox module status is Pending On and the Module Start Date is not updated correctly.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Module__c/a3iVg000000JXptIAG/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FCase%2F500Vg00000YvQyPIAV%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10166", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Dec PS revenue", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shelly Mor", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2026-01-05T12:37:12.556+0200", "updated": "2026-01-13T10:18:06.385+0200", "createdDate": "1/5/2026", "updatedDate": "1/13/2026", "daysOpen": 104, "description": "Email address:sivan.mor@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Dec PS revenueYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Revenue FinOpsFinance Area:RevenuesBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:PS RevenueSteps to Reproduce:Revenue will not be canceled when an amendment or C&T are signed.Expected Behavior:PS projects will not be affected by subscription-related contract changes.Actual Behavior:Negative revenue was recognized on PS projects for customers who made an amendment in December (the amendment to the Subscription)Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10150", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - HG Insights: New Data (Jan 1, 2026) Not Ingesting into Datalake Tables", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2026-01-05T11:17:12.762+0200", "updated": "2026-01-06T11:05:32.477+0200", "createdDate": "1/5/2026", "updatedDate": "1/6/2026", "daysOpen": 104, "description": "Email address:anael.berdugo@hibob.ioIssue Summary:HG Insights: New Data (Jan 1, 2026) Not Ingesting into Datalake TablesYour Department:DataBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:NoSystems Involved:SnowflakeDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:hg insight Steps to Reproduce:PROD_DATALAKE_DB.HG_INSIGHTS.INSTALLS , PROD_DATALAKE_DB.HG_INSIGHTS.SPENDExpected Behavior:We are experiencing an issue where the latest data from the HG Insights Platform Delivery is not being ingested into our Datalake tables.A new delivery notification was received for files dated January 1, 2026.I checked the PROD_DATALAKE_DB.HG_INSIGHTS.INSTALLS and PROD_DATALAKE_DB.HG_INSIGHTS.SPEND tables, and the latest date recorded in both is currently 2025-10-21.Please investigate why the data flow is stuck and the new files are not being loaded. waterfall unpivot . wrong value in MERGERS_AND_ACQUISITIONS Fields", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-30T16:13:35.294+0200", "updated": "2026-01-22T09:37:12.529+0200", "createdDate": "12/30/2025", "updatedDate": "1/22/2026", "daysOpen": 110, "description": "We’ve identified issues with two fields:\n\nMERGERS_AND_ACQUISITIONS\nNo values are currently populated. \n\nMERGERS_AND_ACQUISITIONS_BUCKET\nThis field contains an incorrect value. While it isn’t strictly required (since MERGERS_AND_ACQUISITIONS should only be populated within the relevant bucket).\n If this field is meant to be kept, the values need to be fixed it currently appears once as 'mosaic / pento', whereas the correct value should be 'New Business / Upsell'.\n\nselect distinct\n source,\n MERGERS_AND_ACQUISITIONS,\n MERGERS_AND_ACQUISITIONS_BUCKET\nfrom PROD_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_UNPIVOT\nwhere MERGERS_AND_ACQUISITIONS_BUCKET is not null;" }, { "key": "BT-10080", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production -
