Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10079", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Fix Closed Won CL Mapping", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Racheli Levi Leshem", "reporter": "Racheli Levi Leshem", "created": "2025-12-30T15:47:38.555+0200", "updated": "2026-01-05T13:44:13.364+0200", "createdDate": "12/30/2025", "updatedDate": "1/5/2026", "daysOpen": 110, "description": "Fix Closed Won CL Mapping for Bob Finance Products" }, { "key": "BT-10078", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - [UAT] Can't adjust MinMRR on renewal when BF exists + adjusted MinMRR isn't carried over to the renewal", "status": "Rejected", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Idan Brand", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-30T13:24:37.371+0200", "updated": "2026-01-22T13:01:01.329+0200", "createdDate": "12/30/2025", "updatedDate": "1/22/2026", "daysOpen": 110, "description": "Email address:ido.marcus@hibob.ioIssue Summary:[UAT] Can't adjust MinMRR on renewal when BF exists + adjusted MinMRR isn't carried over to the renewalYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:FinOps (Tech)Finance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:NoSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Bob Finance Renewal ManagementSteps to Reproduce:Missing Adjust MinMRR option for existing BF:1. Bob finance is added to deal and CW.2. Upon renewal of BF, can't adjust MinMRR (even if in DD profile)Carry over adjusted MinMRR:1. Bob finance is added to the deal with adjusted MinMRR2. MinMRR in renewal is replaced with the regular MinMRR of the product ($1650).Both issues are connected. Expected Behavior:Missing Adjust MinMRR option for existing BF:Deal desk users have the question to adjust MinMRR in T&Cs, the rep can then adjust the MinMRR in the contract subscription table.Carry over adjusted MinMRR:1. Upon renewal of BF, the MinMRR is the previous one and not the default one ($1650) 2. DD has the question to allow MinMRR adjustment.Actual Behavior:Missing Adjust MinMRR option for existing BF:DD doesn't have the option to allow MinMRR adjustment.Carry over adjusted MinMRR:The default is $1650 and not the previous one.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob--uat.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006Vg00000IdTr5IAF/view———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10068", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - New View prod_DWH.WATERFALL.mrt_opp_product_warr wtf should be sorted by opp line id desc and NOT acs", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Adi Yehuda Faians", "created": "2025-12-30T10:08:08.903+0200", "updated": "2026-01-05T15:20:47.280+0200", "createdDate": "12/30/2025", "updatedDate": "1/5/2026", "daysOpen": 111, "description": "New View prod_DWH.WATERFALL.mrt_opp_product_warr wtf should be sorted by opp line id desc and NOT acs. Ive discussed this with Limo and its not per her design.\nIn addition once resolved we need to make sure it applies on the Workato views we ae actually using in our recepie (\n DEV_INTEGRATION_VIEW.WORKATO.VIEW_OPP_PRODUCT_WARR wtf\n PROD_INTEGRATION_VIEW.WORKATO.VIEW_OPP_PRODUCT_WARR wtf" }, { "key": "BT-10066", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Purchase requests stuck in Workato-NetSuite integration stage", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-30T07:50:26.360+0200", "updated": "2026-01-12T11:14:48.831+0200", "createdDate": "12/30/2025", "updatedDate": "1/12/2026", "daysOpen": 111, "description": "Email address:adi.katz@hibob.ioPriority Level:High (blocking critical procurement processes)Request Type:Technical IssueWhich area is your request related to?:Purchase Request approval flowPR number/Vendor name/PO number:1312Describe Your Request:The requests are currently in the Workato–NetSuite integration stage in the flow.How can we complete these requests? I’ve attached a report with all the relevant requests that are in this status.———————————————This task was submitted through Zip Support https://form.asana.com/?k=Zoh9UFaD-TSKjjc6jWpSWQ&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10063", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Release Branch is not Restored to Zero", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ilay Reshef", "reporter": "Daniel Starkman", "created": "2025-12-29T21:10:41.772+0200", "updated": "2026-01-01T10:58:33.722+0200", "createdDate": "12/29/2025", "updatedDate": "1/1/2026", "daysOpen": 111, "description": "After Sync Process , release branch should be createdreason Fetch don’t finish Action items:Find error issue , link to failed job - LinkAdd monitor step to Webhook: Update git action result in both cases Payload expected {\n\t\t\"actionPerformed\": \"Fetch Sync\",\n\t\t\"status\": \"Success\",\n\t\t\"fromBranch\": \"master\",\n\t\t\"toBranch\": \"master\",\n\t\t\"env\": \"production\",\n\t\t\"message\": \"Fetch Sync completed successfully\",\n\t\t\"jobUrl\": \"https://github.com/hibobio/MIS-Netsuite/actions/runs/XXX\"\n\t}" }, { "key": "BT-10006", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - PR Finalization Error - #1360, #3607", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-28T12:30:23.554+0200", "updated": "2026-01-01T16:43:42.152+0200", "createdDate": "12/28/2025", "updatedDate": "1/1/2026", "daysOpen": 112, "description": "Email address:batel.zamir@hibob.ioPriority Level:High (blocking critical procurement processes)Request Type:Technical IssueWhich area is your request related to?:Purchase Request approval flowPR number/Vendor name/PO number:#1360, #3607Describe Your Request:Finalise error in PRs ———————————————This task was submitted through Zip Support https://form.asana.com/?k=Zoh9UFaD-TSKjjc6jWpSWQ&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-10001", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - files from Zip do not transfer to LS", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-28T11:05:43.519+0200", "updated": "2026-01-05T22:24:32.790+0200", "createdDate": "12/28/2025", "updatedDate": "1/5/2026", "daysOpen": 112, "description": "Email address:natali.elias@hibob.ioIssue Summary:files from Zip do not transfer to LSYour Department:LegalBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:YesSystems Involved:ZIPDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:LSSteps to Reproduce:we get an error when trying to move files to LS in the first LS node in Zip. I tried to change the files name so there won't be ( but it still not workingExpected Behavior:workActual Behavior:we get an error when trying to move files to LS in the first LS node in Zip. I tried to change the files name so there won't be ( but it still not workingIs there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9987", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Fact_WA_ARR - duplications of account_status value - on chun value", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-25T17:32:35.346+0200", "updated": "2025-12-28T10:56:07.256+0200", "createdDate": "12/25/2025", "updatedDate": "12/28/2025", "daysOpen": 115, "description": "see below all values for account_status:\nselect\n distinct account_status,\n count (*)\nfrom uat_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR wa\ngroup by all\n\nchurn is written in 2 ways - pls unify - as 'Churn'\nit also effects the 'chuen_effective_date' field\n\nselect distinct \n\nACCOUNT_STATUS,\nCHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE,\nsource,\nfrom dev_DWH.WATERFALL.fact_wa_arr\nwhere 1=1\n and ACCOUNT_STATUS not in ('Churn','churn')\n and CHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE is not null" }, { "key": "BT-9986", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - opportunities with ARPU change of less than 0.1 are classified as uplift", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-25T16:21:39.321+0200", "updated": "2025-12-28T08:55:27.864+0200", "createdDate": "12/25/2025", "updatedDate": "12/28/2025", "daysOpen": 115, "description": "per design (in Fact_wa_arr) - bucket name='Uplift' shoulb be per:FACT_WA_ARR.WA_ARR_ARPU > FACT_WA_ARR.PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU then 'Uplift' (and make sure to check it > 0.1 value)same for ‘Downlift’FACT_WA_ARR.WA_ARR_ARPU < FACT_WA_ARR.PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU then 'Downlift' (and make sure to check it > 0.1 value)see below cases as example for Uplitselect * from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPPwhere bucket_name = 'Uplift' and warr_source = 'Opportunity' and wa_arr_arpu - previous_carr_wa_arpu <0.01limit 100;" }, { "key": "BT-9985", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Fact_WA_ARR - Null values for Bucket name <> flat", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-25T14:47:35.814+0200", "updated": "2025-12-25T15:06:42.923+0200", "createdDate": "12/25/2025", "updatedDate": "12/25/2025", "daysOpen": 115, "description": "there are record with bucket <> flat and no value in bucket value:\nselect * from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nwhere BUCKET_NAME <> 'Flat'\nand BUCKET_VALUE is not null\nand PRODUCT_FAMILY<> 'Payroll'" }, { "key": "BT-9984", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - US Payroll & BA are not part of the approval process in Dealhub", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Idan Brand", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-25T14:38:56.826+0200", "updated": "2026-01-05T15:17:45.039+0200", "createdDate": "12/25/2025", "updatedDate": "1/5/2026", "daysOpen": 115, "description": "Email address:ido.marcus@hibob.ioIssue Summary:US Payroll & BA are not part of the approval process in DealhubYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:FinOps (Tech)Finance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:YesSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:US PayrollSteps to Reproduce:Tested in UAT only:Create a quote with US Payroll and submit for approvalsExpected Behavior:if US Payroll or Ben Admin are present in the deal, DD should be part of the approval process for all opportunity types.Actual Behavior:No approvals needed by DD if US Payroll exists (at least in Upsell)Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob--uat--dealhub.sandbox.vf.force.com/apex/DealHub?param=Quotes&OpportunityId=006Ve00000FYuwoIAD&isdtp=mn———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9983", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - missing records when 'warr_source'='waterfall'", "status": "Not Started", "priority": "Low", "assignee": "Limor Gersch", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-25T14:25:37.835+0200", "updated": "2026-03-29T18:04:48.040+0300", "createdDate": "12/25/2025", "updatedDate": "3/29/2026", "daysOpen": 115, "description": "missing records in table the expected results is אם have records from both waterfall and warr *** also if in waterfall we dont have value in the buckets we still need to have record based on date_id = close won / close datesee here what is missing:with single_opp as (select COMPANY_ID, OPPORTUNITY_ID, PRODUCT_code from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPPwhere PRODUCT_FAMILY<>'payroll'and BUCKET_NAME <> 'Churn'group by allhaving count(*) =1)select w.OPPORTUNITY_ID, w.PRODUCT_CODE, w.COMPANY_ID, w.WARR_SOURCE, w.CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP, w.CLOSE_DATE, w.MODEL_TYPEfrom UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP winner join single_opp son w.OPPORTUNITY_ID = s.OPPORTUNITY_IDand w.PRODUCT_CODE = s.PRODUCT_CODEwhere BUCKET_NAME <> 'Churn'order by OPPORTUNITY_ID,PRODUCT_CODE;you can see that for this company_id, product_code and date_id - we have record in the waterfall_dailyselect close_won_time_stamp,*from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_DAILYwhere COMPANY_ID = '512404'and REVENUE_TYPE = 'carr'and DATE_ID = '2024-12-29'meeniing - if there’s no recor in the waterfall on the opportunity_id, need to bring the data from the waterfall based on Company_id, product_code, and close_won/close_date= date_id (same as we do when connecting to POP in the first moodel Fact_wa_arr) - i’ve added thid comment in the general info of the STT:" }, { "key": "BT-9982", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - LS Second node in Zip not Automatically closed and the signed agreement is not pulled back to Zip", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-25T13:36:06.266+0200", "updated": "2026-01-12T12:02:52.557+0200", "createdDate": "12/25/2025", "updatedDate": "1/12/2026", "daysOpen": 115, "description": "Request Summary:LS Second node in Zip not Automatically closed and the signed agreement is not pulled back to ZipEmail address:natali.elias@hibob.ioPriority:HighYour Team:LegalInvolved Systems:ZIPRequest Type:Technical IssueWhich area is your request related to?:OtherPR number/Vendor name/PO number:3513Additional Details:Hi, That's a bug not a new request (don't know how to open a new bug), LS second node in Zip not Automatically closed once the agreement is fully signed and the signed agreement is not pulled back to Zip as it's suppose to. this is URGENT! Thanks!!———————————————This task was submitted through BT - Ongoing Supporthttps://form.asana.com/?k=5IBQWw2cjsFsy6P3_02rYA&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9966", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - in fields that we're bringiing data from MRT_WTFL_DAILY to the FACT_WA_ARR - need to bring them where bucket_name <> 'churn'", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-24T17:55:29.391+0200", "updated": "2025-12-25T11:47:50.159+0200", "createdDate": "12/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/25/2025", "daysOpen": 116, "description": "when warr_source='Opportunity' then:segment - bring eqvivlent record for the same oppprtunity, product_code for lower(bucket_name <> churn)IS_CURRENCY_CHANGED - bring value from waterfall for the same opportunity_id, product_code - and lower(bucket name) <> 'churn'previous_opportunity_id - bring the record from daily for opportunity id and product when lower(bucket name) <> churnUpdated in the STT:" }, { "key": "BT-9965", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Error when running approvals", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-24T17:28:41.673+0200", "updated": "2025-12-29T16:50:13.661+0200", "createdDate": "12/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/29/2025", "daysOpen": 116, "description": "Email address:ikemi.williamson@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Error when running approvals Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Getting this discrepancy when trying to run approvals. Not sure what the discrepancy is. Are you able to tell me where the discrepancy is?Expected Behavior:Click Run approvals, contract is sent to billing for reviewActual Behavior:Receiving error about discrepancy between opp and contract Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006Vg00000HaNM9IAN/related/OpportunityLineItems/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001Vg000003wGfRIAU%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9964", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - payroll actual - wrong previous weithed arpu", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-24T17:23:31.873+0200", "updated": "2025-12-24T18:24:25.869+0200", "createdDate": "12/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/24/2025", "daysOpen": 116, "description": "for exmaple - expected to be 6\n select\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n USAGE_IND,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n RENEWAL_LINE_TYPE,\n NET_PRICE,\n TERMINATE_AND_CLONE_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n TERMINATE_AND_CLONE_DATE,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n rn,\n IS_ACTIVE_USAGE_IND,\n NUMBER_OF_EES,\n NUMBER_OF_EES*NET_PRICE\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_POP\n where COMPANY_ID = '633566'\n and PRODUCT_CODE = 'UKP0001'\n and USAGE_IND = '549d14e4-017f-4b24-adc2-087ea440679e'\n and DATE_ID = '2025-10-15'\n and MODEL_TYPE = 'actual'\n and REVENUE_TYPE ='arr'\n\n\n\n\n\n select\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n NUMBER_OF_EE_CALC,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n QUANTITY_MONTH_EE,\n MIN_OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n MAX_OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n BUCKET_VALUE,\n PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU,\n BUCKET_NAME,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP\n\n from\n UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\n where COMPANY_ID = '633566'\n and PRODUCT_CODE = 'UKP0001'\n and USAGE_IND = '549d14e4-017f-4b24-adc2-087ea440679e'\n-- and CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP = '2024-10-16'\n and OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006Vg00000NPcBKIA1'" }, { "key": "BT-9959", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Sub validation fails on US Payroll/ben admin billing group despite snowflake alignment", "status": "Not Started", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Guy Levin", "reporter": "Guy Levin", "created": "2025-12-24T17:07:21.960+0200", "updated": "2026-01-22T13:01:01.338+0200", "createdDate": "12/24/2025", "updatedDate": "1/22/2026", "daysOpen": 116, "description": "create a billing group contract with us payroll/ben admin\nsync it to NS\ncheck subscription validation\n\nactual: should work- report should align\n\nexpected: its showing like its not aligned in the report, but the data in snowflake is goodexample:https://4672400-sb3.app.netsuite.com/app/common/custom/custrecordentry.nl?rectype=334&id=760002select id,CUSTRECORD_HB_BILLING_PRODUCT_NAME,name, CUSTRECORDEE_GROUP from TEST_DATALAKE_DB.NETSUITE.CUSTOMRECORDZAB_SUBSCRIPTION_ITEM where CUSTRECORDZAB_SI_SUBSCRIPTION='760002'\nand CUSTRECORDEE_GROUP is not null\n\nselect id,NAME,PRODUCT_FULL_NAME_C, GROUP_ID_C, ACTIVE_GROUP_C from TEST_DATALAKE_DB.SALESFORCE.CONTRACT_LINE_C\nwhere CONTRACT_C='800Ve00000JVgEXIA1' and GROUP_ID_C is not null" }, { "key": "BT-9955", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Zip PR approval reassignment by GL is not working automatically", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-24T15:41:10.788+0200", "updated": "2026-02-01T15:10:39.567+0200", "createdDate": "12/24/2025", "updatedDate": "2/1/2026", "daysOpen": 116, "description": "Email address:batel.zamir@hibob.ioPriority Level:High (blocking critical procurement processes)Request Type:Technical IssueWhich area is your request related to?:Purchase Request formPR number/Vendor name/PO number:Reassign approval by GL condition in the queue doesn't work automaticallyDescribe Your Request:We have a problem with the new PRS that the approval reassigned automatically doesn't work.It's supposed to reassign approvals by the GL in the line, and from the minute we move to items, it stopped working.I am updated automatically, but it's the worst———————————————This task was submitted through Zip Support https://form.asana.com/?k=Zoh9UFaD-TSKjjc6jWpSWQ&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9954", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP & mrt_opp_product_warr - add dwh_update_at", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-24T15:33:39.870+0200", "updated": "2025-12-24T16:13:10.472+0200", "createdDate": "12/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/24/2025", "daysOpen": 116, "description": "addd to the 2 mrts:\nmrt_opp_product_warr\nMRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP\nDWH_update_at\n\nto fact_wa_arr - add update date field as well" }, { "key": "BT-9950", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Fact wa arr - number of ee calc need to be calcuated only for number of ee higher then 0", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Stanislav Livshyn", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-24T14:35:25.870+0200", "updated": "2025-12-29T09:29:59.101+0200", "createdDate": "12/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/29/2025", "daysOpen": 116, "description": "numberr of ee calc is calcuated as \nFACT_WA_ARR.QUANTITY_MONTH_EE / sum opportunity_product_duration (pop / int ) \nthe opportunity_product_duration need to be calcuated only on records with number of ee higher then -0\n\nall detailed in stt - https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1sGS0r4QPJ_BJd1DJkl2LkiEZm0VfhmsVi91AvP9QPa8/edit?gid=72316020#gid=72316020\n\nexample \n\n select COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n TCV_LINE_CW,\n NUMBER_OF_EE_CALC_CW,\n FROM_QUANTITY,\n TO_QUANTITY,\n USAGE_IND\n\n from\n UAT_DWH.INT.INT_UNION_READINESS_PREP_POP\n where COMPANY_ID = '641605'\n and MODEL_TYPE = 'actual'\n and PRODUCT_CODE = 'COM0001'\n order by PRODUCT_CODE, OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE\n\nthe number of ee calc need to be 4800" }, { "key": "BT-9943", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Cannot generate contract", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-24T13:31:20.476+0200", "updated": "2026-01-22T12:42:14.206+0200", "createdDate": "12/24/2025", "updatedDate": "1/22/2026", "daysOpen": 116, "description": "Email address:olamide.onanuga@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Cannot generate contractYour Department:Customer GrowthBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:YesSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Current UKP UpsellSteps to Reproduce:n/aExpected Behavior:n/aActual Behavior:n/aIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob--dealhub.vf.force.com/apex/DealHub?param=Quotes&OpportunityId=006Vg00000O87HpIAJ&isdtp=mn, https://hibob--dealhub.vf.force.com/apex/DealHub?param=Quotes&OpportunityId=006Vg00000O87HpIAJ&isdtp=mn———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9934", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong 'MIN_OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE' & 'max_opportunity_product_end_date' calculations", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-24T10:07:17.496+0200", "updated": "2025-12-24T19:39:42.188+0200", "createdDate": "12/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/24/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "see the below query - where I check diffeerences with FACT_WA_ARR:select distinct wa.OPPORTUNITY_ID, wa.product_code, wa.BUCKET_NAME, wa.warr_source, wa.usage_ind, Fw.min_opportunity_product_start_date as FACT_min_opportunity_product_start_date, Fw.max_opportunity_product_end_date as FACT_max_opportunity_product_end_date, wa.min_opportunity_product_start_date, wa.max_opportunity_product_end_date,from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP waleft join uat_dwh.waterfall.fact_wa_arr FW on wa.company_id=FW.company_id and wa.opportunity_id=FW.opportunity_id and wa.product_code=FW.product_code and wa.close_won_time_stamp=FW.close_won_time_stamp and wa.model_type=FW.MODEL_TYPE and wa.usage_ind=fw.usage_ind_warrwhere 1=1 --and FACT_min_opportunity_product_start_date <> wa.min_opportunity_product_start_date and FACT_max_opportunity_product_end_date <> wa.max_opportunity_product_end_dateorder by OPPORTUNITY_ID, product_codevs.select    opportunity_id,    product_code,    usage_ind_warr,    min_opportunity_product_start_date,    max_opportunity_product_end_datefrom uat_dwh.waterfall.fact_wa_arrwhere 1=1    and opportunity_id='006Vg00000LFBn4IAH'order by opportunity_id" }, { "key": "BT-9930", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - missing 2 fields", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-23T21:11:24.390+0200", "updated": "2025-12-24T16:31:18.874+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/24/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - missing 2 fields:\nproduct_line_ownership_calc_name\nproduct_line_ownership_calc_bobid" }, { "key": "BT-9926", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Sub-Category seems to not be compulsory on DD Cases", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Low", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-23T16:53:34.568+0200", "updated": "2026-01-08T16:13:55.597+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "1/8/2026", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "Email address:emma.pearse@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Sub-Category seems to not be compulsory on DD CasesYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:LowBusiness Severity:LowRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Not sureExpected Behavior:When reps open a DD case a Sub-Category should be compulsory Actual Behavior:It appears to not be compulsory to reps when creating a case and only when DD go to close a case, we get prompted to fill in a Sub-Category if its missing. Without the sub-category we can't close the caseIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:Applies to all case types———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9925", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Error in DealHub quote that is stopping imminent signature", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-23T16:23:24.270+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T16:42:02.560+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "Email address:adam.smith@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Error in DealHub quote that is stopping imminent signatureYour Department:SalesBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:We are trying to get a contract signed today after some long legal negotiations but I am getting an error.I have a quote already approved with all the commercial conditions, but when duplicating and adding the legal conditions it has caused an error and I now can't use the original or create another duplicate without the same error.To go through all the commercial approvals again would take a long time and we are trying to get this signed asap so can you help us resolve the error and duplicate the approved quote so we can add the legal conditions to have them approved and then get the contract signed please? Thanks in advance for your help!Expected Behavior:Expected to add legal conditions to the quote and then submit for approval without error.Actual Behavior:When adding the geal conditions I got initially a 404 error message but I am now getting a generic message saying \"Something went wrong. Try again or contact DealHub support.\"Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob--dealhub.vf.force.com/apex/DealHub?param=Quotes&OpportunityId=006Vg00000OJXNSIA5&isdtp=mn———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9924", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Unable to run dd approvals on the contract", "status": "Rejected", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-23T16:21:14.338+0200", "updated": "2026-01-22T13:01:01.231+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "1/22/2026", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "Email address:emma.pearse@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Unable to run dd approvals on the contractYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:LowRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Not sureExpected Behavior:Able to run dd approvalsActual Behavior:Unable to due to attached errorIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800Vg00000ZI0YXIA1/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F0010Y00000s81lkQAA%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9923", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - As soon as I open any quote on Dealhub the error immediatley pops out (screenshot) my next step in dealhub would be to submit my quote when i tried this first, that popped out the first time feel free to huddle/ or slack", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-23T16:02:47.156+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T16:23:11.954+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "Email address:ludwig.mehmke@hibob.ioIssue Summary:As soon as I open any quote on Dealhub the error immediatley pops out (screenshot) my next step in dealhub would be to submit my quote when i tried this first, that popped out the first time feel free to huddle/ or slackYour Department:SalesBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Coachhub GmbHSteps to Reproduce:Log into the DealHub platform.Navigate to any existing quote.Click to open the quote.(Alternative step) Attempt to click the \"Submit\" button within an open quote.Expected Behavior:The quote should open without errors, allowing for review and the successful submission of the quote to the next stage of the workflow.Actual Behavior:n error message immediately pops up upon opening the quote(Screenshot). This same error also appeared previously when attempting to submit a quote for the first time. The error prevents any further progression in the quoting process.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob--dealhub.vf.force.com/apex/DealHub?param=Quotes&OpportunityId=006Vg00000KWm4QIAT&isdtp=mn———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9922", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Keep getting error 404 when trying to create quote", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-23T15:47:04.908+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T16:37:01.600+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "Email address:ray.treacy@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Keep getting error 404 when trying to create quote Your Department:LegalBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:I'm trying to create the upsell opp/quote as per the process to issue a creadit but every time I try do anything to create a quote I keep getting the attached error and it will not save. This has happened on two different upsell opps and can't progressExpected Behavior:as aboveActual Behavior:as aboveIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006Vg00000QXUoOIAX/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F0017S000002KSeBQAW%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9920", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong 'opportunity_source' values", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-23T14:24:43.264+0200", "updated": "2025-12-25T09:35:30.217+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/25/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "select distinctwarr_source,opportunity_sourcefrom UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP t2WARR_SOURCEOPPORTUNITY_SOURCEOpportunityMosaicwaterfallhibobOpportunityPentowaterfallmosaicOpportunityBobsee that in case of WARR_SOURCE=”Opportunity' the value of Opportunity_source sarts with capital letter.pls check the source where you take the origin field from" }, { "key": "BT-9914", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong 'is_currency_changed' calculations", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Limor Gersch", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-23T12:55:21.730+0200", "updated": "2025-12-25T10:45:54.454+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/25/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "pls cehck the below - diffs:select distinct wa.OPPORTUNITY_ID, wa.BUCKET_NAME, wa.product_code, wa.warr_source, wa.opportunity_currency, b.previous_from_currency, d.is_currency_changed as WTFL_is_currency_changed, wa.is_currency_changedfrom uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP waleft join uat_dwh.waterfall.mrt_wtfl_daily D on wa.company_id=D.company_id and wa.opportunity_id=d.opportunity_id and wa.product_code=d.product_code and wa.close_won_time_stamp=D.DATE_ID and wa.model_type=D.MODEL_TYPEleft join uat_DWH.waterfall.fact_waterfall_buckets B on WA.company_id=B.COMPANY_ID and wa.product_code=B.PRODUCT_CODE and wa.model_type=B.MODEL_TYPE and wa.close_won_time_stamp=B.DATE_ID where 1=1 and B.REVENUE_TYPE='carr' and d.revenue_type='carr' and D.IS_DUMMY_CORE=FALSE and ( D.new_business is not null or D.upsell is not null or D.uplift is not null or D.downsell is not null or D.downlift is not null or D.churn is not null or coalesce(WA.close_won_time_stamp::Date, wa.close_date) = D.date_id) and WTFL_is_currency_changed <> wa.is_currency_changed" }, { "key": "BT-9913", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Dealroom Hub issue please resolve ASAP", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-23T12:45:52.611+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T13:34:24.001+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "Email address:nick.maier@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Dealroom Hub issue please resolve ASAPYour Department:SalesBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:https://hibob--dealhub.vf.force.com/apex/DealHub?param=Quotes&OpportunityId=006Vg00000KAn0kIAD&isdtp=mnSteps to Reproduce:Resolve bug message, deal is already approved, I need to share the contract with the customer ASAPExpected Behavior:Act on it asapActual Behavior:Error while generating HTML document. Document: Long Form, Section: Body, Error: \"issues at Line 55, Col 68\". Please contact your DealHub Admin.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006Vg00000KAn0kIAD/view———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9894", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong 'root_cause' calculation", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-23T11:14:29.879+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T15:40:21.252+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "where warr_source='waterfall' and bucket_name='Churm' there are records that appear Null in MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP, while there are values in the Dim_churn_requests. see below query: select distinct wa.OPPORTUNITY_ID, wa.BUCKET_NAME, wa.product_code, wa.warr_source, fw.root_cause, wa.root_cause, C.CHURN_ROOT_CAUSEfrom uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP waleft join uat_dwh.waterfall.fact_wa_arr FW on wa.company_id=FW.company_id and wa.opportunity_id=FW.opportunity_id and wa.product_code=FW.product_code and wa.close_won_time_stamp=FW.close_won_time_stamp and wa.model_type=FW.MODEL_TYPEleft join uat_dwh.waterfall.mrt_wtfl_daily D on wa.company_id=D.company_id and wa.opportunity_id=d.opportunity_id and wa.product_code=d.product_code and wa.close_won_time_stamp=D.DATE_ID and wa.model_type=D.MODEL_TYPEleft join uat_dwh.shared.dim_churn_requests C on D.CHURN_REQUEST_ID=C.churn_request_idwhere 1=1 and d.revenue_type='carr' and D.IS_DUMMY_CORE=FALSE and ( D.new_business is not null or D.upsell is not null or D.uplift is not null or D.downsell is not null or D.downlift is not null or D.churn is not null or coalesce(WA.close_won_time_stamp::Date, wa.close_date) = D.date_id) and warr_source='waterfall' and wa.bucket_name ='Churn'" }, { "key": "BT-9892", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong 'segment' calculation", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-23T11:03:47.821+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T13:49:40.065+0200", "createdDate": "12/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 117, "description": "where warr_source='waterfall' I get discrepencies on ‘segment’ - see below select:select distinct wa.model_type, wa.OPPORTUNITY_ID, wa.BUCKET_NAME, wa.product_code, wa.warr_source, wa.segment, D.SEGMENT as SEGMENT_WTFLfrom uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP waleft join uat_dwh.waterfall.mrt_wtfl_daily D on wa.company_id=D.company_id and wa.opportunity_id=d.opportunity_id and wa.product_code=d.product_code and wa.close_won_time_stamp=D.DATE_ID and wa.model_type=D.MODEL_TYPEwhere 1=1 and warr_source='waterfall' and d.revenue_type='carr' and D.IS_DUMMY_CORE=FALSE and ( D.new_business is not null or D.upsell is not null or D.uplift is not null or D.downsell is not null or D.downlift is not null or D.churn is not null or coalesce(WA.close_won_time_stamp::Date, wa.close_date) = D.date_id) and wa.segment<>D.SEGMENT" }, { "key": "BT-9864", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong value - GROUPING_IND", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Unassigned", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-22T21:05:06.843+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T21:10:35.783+0200", "createdDate": "12/22/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 118, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-9863", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Finalized request is stuck due to Workato failure - PO is not created.", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-22T19:10:38.902+0200", "updated": "2025-12-30T11:22:50.177+0200", "createdDate": "12/22/2025", "updatedDate": "12/30/2025", "daysOpen": 118, "description": "Email address:nina.ryazanov@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Finalized request is stuck due to Workato failure - PO is not created.Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:Procure to PayBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:ZIPDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:1. Open the finalized request2. Workato automation runs3. Task “Workato – PO Approved” failsExpected Behavior:Finalized request completes successfully and the PO is created.Actual Behavior:Finalized request remains stuck with a Workato error stating the PO was not created. bank details also didn't sync for this vendor to NS.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.ziphq.com/request/0e029d97-8399-8580-8720-00848a2b6e90/overview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9859", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - wrong opportunity duration , opportunity product duration , please check if not impact all use cases", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-22T17:30:02.935+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T10:53:41.333+0200", "createdDate": "12/22/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 118, "description": "in the following case we expect to have opportunity duration and opportunity product duration of 25 months\n\nselect\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n QUANTITY_MONTH_EE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n OPPORTUNITY_DURATION,\n NUMBER_OF_EE_CALC,\n TCV_PRODUCT,\n MIN_OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n MAX_OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE\n\n\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nwhere SOURCE = 'mosaic'\nand OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006UH000001IV3GYAW'\n\n-- also the min opportunity start date is wrong\nthe opportunity has 2 records\nthe first start on Mar 01 2025\n\nselect OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE_legacy\n from UAT_DWH.INT.INT_UNION_READINESS_PREP_POP\nwhere OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006UH000001IV3GYAW'\nand PRODUCT_CODE ='Growth_FY23Q1'" }, { "key": "BT-9835", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - previous_opportunity_id is null", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-22T14:03:33.367+0200", "updated": "2025-12-25T09:35:14.836+0200", "createdDate": "12/22/2025", "updatedDate": "12/25/2025", "daysOpen": 118, "description": "pls check why it's null:\nselect distinct previous_opportunity_id\nfrom uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP wa" }, { "key": "BT-9822", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Sandbox module charges cancelled due to incorrect negative usage line on invoice INVNL31525", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-22T12:56:37.612+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T16:18:03.346+0200", "createdDate": "12/22/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 118, "description": "Email address:noam.muskat@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Sandbox module charges cancelled due to incorrect negative usage line on invoice INVNL31525Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Billing & CollectionFinance Area:BillingBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:1. Open invoice INVNL31525 in the approval queue.2. Review the Sandbox module section in the invoice preview.3. Observe that three Sandbox-related lines appear:Two regular charge linesOne additional line displayed in a separate table below the charge lines4. Note that the additional line displays the full module usage as a negative amount.Expected Behavior:The Sandbox module should bill correctly based on the active charge line CL-0075406 (effective from 21/07/2025), as it did in the previous month.Actual Behavior:A separate Sandbox usage line appears in the preview with the entire usage shown as a negative value, which cancels out the module charges completely.As a result, the invoice shows zero billing for Sandbox instead of the correct charge.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/accounting/transactions/custinvc.nl?id=9043834———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9816", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong value in WA_ARR_ARPU_usd field", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-22T12:05:06.863+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T12:58:25.487+0200", "createdDate": "12/22/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 118, "description": "in cases where warr_source='waterfall' - we have ~900 cases for wrong WA_ARR_ARPU_usd valueselect distinct wa.OPPORTUNITY_ID, wa.BUCKET_NAME, wa.product_code, wa.warr_source, wa.WA_ARR_ARPU_USD, FW.BUDGET_RATE as FW_BUDGET_RATE, FW.WA_ARR_ARPU as FW_WA_ARR_ARPU, FW.WA_ARR_ARPU * FW.BUDGET_RATE as WA_ARR_ARPU_USD_WA_FACT, D.WEIGTHED_AVERAGE_ARPU as wtfl_WEIGTHED_AVERAGE_ARPU, D.BUDGET_RATE as wtfl_BUDGET_RATE, D.WEIGTHED_AVERAGE_ARPU *D.BUDGET_RATE as WEIGTHED_AVERAGE_ARPU_USD_CALCfrom uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP waleft join uat_dwh.waterfall.mrt_wtfl_daily D on wa.company_id=D.company_id and wa.opportunity_id=d.opportunity_id and wa.product_code=d.product_code and wa.close_won_time_stamp=D.DATE_ID and wa.model_type=D.MODEL_TYPEleft join uat_dwh.waterfall.fact_wa_arr FW on wa.company_id=FW.company_id and wa.opportunity_id=FW.opportunity_id and wa.product_code=FW.product_code and wa.close_won_time_stamp=FW.close_won_time_stamp and wa.model_type=FW.MODEL_TYPEwhere 1=1 and wa.model_type='actual' and wa.product_family<>'Payroll' and d.revenue_type='carr' and is_dummy_core=FALSE and D.SOURCE<>'pento' and warr_source='waterfall' and wa.WA_ARR_ARPU_USD<>WEIGTHED_AVERAGE_ARPU_USD_CALC and year(coalesce(WA.CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP::date, WA.close_date::date)) >= 2023" }, { "key": "BT-9811", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong value in WA_ARR_ARPU field", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-22T11:28:54.253+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T12:59:23.191+0200", "createdDate": "12/22/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 118, "description": "pls check the below - I get the wrong value for WA_ARR_ARPUfor examle: opp_id = ‘0067S00000D5MpZQAV’OPPORTUNITY_IDBUCKET_NAMEPRODUCT_CODEWARR_SOURCEWA_ARR_ARPUWA_ARR_ARPU_WA_FACTWTFL_WEIGTHED_AVERAGE_ARPU0067S00000D5MpZQAVChurnCOR0001waterfall9.972710.19124174410.1912I expect to see WA_ARR_ARPU = 10.1912 in case WARR_SOURCE='waterfall'select distinct wa.OPPORTUNITY_ID, wa.BUCKET_NAME, wa.product_code, wa.warr_source, wa.WA_ARR_ARPU, FW.WA_ARR_ARPU as WA_ARR_ARPU_WA_FACT, D.WEIGTHED_AVERAGE_ARPU as wtfl_WEIGTHED_AVERAGE_ARPUfrom uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP waleft join uat_dwh.waterfall.mrt_wtfl_daily D on wa.company_id=D.company_id and wa.opportunity_id=d.opportunity_id and wa.product_code=d.product_code and wa.close_won_time_stamp=D.DATE_ID and wa.model_type=D.MODEL_TYPEleft join uat_dwh.waterfall.fact_wa_arr FW on wa.company_id=FW.company_id and wa.opportunity_id=FW.opportunity_id and wa.product_code=FW.product_code and wa.close_won_time_stamp=FW.close_won_time_stamp and wa.model_type=FW.MODEL_TYPEwhere 1=1 and wa.model_type='actual' and wa.product_family<>'Payroll' and d.revenue_type='carr' and D.IS_DUMMY_CORE=FALSE and D.SOURCE<>'pento' and warr_source='waterfall' and wa.WA_ARR_ARPU <> D.WEIGTHED_AVERAGE_ARPU and year(coalesce(WA.CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP::date, WA.close_date::date)) >= 2023" }, { "key": "BT-9803", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - forecast - bucket name - if there is a diffrence between arpu and prev arpu it cant be flat", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-22T07:05:37.986+0200", "updated": "2025-12-31T18:26:27.360+0200", "createdDate": "12/22/2025", "updatedDate": "12/31/2025", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "we have 2 issues:opportunity_product_end_date < coalse (close_won_time_stamp,closed_date)no record for the opportunity with CRR_flag=TRUEin the following case, there is a difference between arpu and prev arpu or one of them does not exists - it can be flat\nplease check\n\n select\n COMPANY_ID, OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n PRODUCT_FAMILY,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n CLOSE_DATE,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n\n USAGE_IND,\n PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU,\n WA_ARR_ARPU,\n BUCKET_NAME,\n BUCKET_VALUE\n from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\n where abs(nvl(PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU,0)-nvl(WA_ARR_ARPU,0)) >0.1\n and BUCKET_NAME ilike '%flat%'\n and MODEL_TYPE = 'forecast'" }, { "key": "BT-9802", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - missing values in previous carr wa arpu", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-22T06:46:19.843+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T13:27:32.458+0200", "createdDate": "12/22/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "missing values in PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU\n\nfor example \n\nexist in pop day before\n\n\nselect COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n NET_PRICE,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n USAGE_IND,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n CLOSE_DATE,\n RENEWAL_LINE_TYPE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n MODEL_TYPE\n\n from prod_DWH.INT.INT_UNION_READINESS_PREP_POP\nwhere COMPANY_ID = '637092'\nand PRODUCT_CODE = 'ACA0001'\nand OPPORTUNITY_ID ='006Vg00000MRlz4IAD'\n--and COMPANY_ID ='636895'\n\n\nselect\n DATE_ID,\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n USAGE_IND,\n IS_ACTIVE_USAGE_IND,\n NET_PRICE\nfrom UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_POP\nwhere COMPANY_ID = '637092'\nand PRODUCT_CODE = 'ACA0001'\nand DATE_ID = '2026-01-25'\nand MODEL_TYPE = 'actual'\n\norder by date_id\n\n select\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n PRODUCT_FAMILY,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n CLOSE_DATE,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n\n USAGE_IND,\n PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU,\n WA_ARR_ARPU,\n BUCKET_NAME,\n BUCKET_VALUE\n from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\n where nvl(PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU,0)<>nvl(WA_ARR_ARPU,0)\n and BUCKET_NAME ilike '%flat%'\nand COMPANY_ID = '637092'\n\nand PRODUCT_CODE = 'ACA0001'" }, { "key": "BT-9795", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong value in STAGE_NAME field", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-21T19:01:41.818+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T14:30:36.594+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "Null values for ‘STAGE_NAME’ Select distinct OPPORTUNITY_ID, BUCKET_NAME, product_code, warr_sourcefrom uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP where stage_name is nullmake sure that for the source of Waterfall - you take it from Dim_Opportunity / Dim_Opportunity_Mosaic" }, { "key": "BT-9794", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - wrong value in opportunity_type field", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-21T18:43:07.290+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T14:30:24.923+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "because of wrong STT logic, pls update the field as the below: when the source of the union is mrt_wtfl_daily, then the field need to be taken is: 'type_of_opportunity' when the source table is WA_ARR - leave as it is now (opportunity_type)" }, { "key": "BT-9792", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Can't open any invoice or credit note in NS", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Ilay Reshef", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-21T17:19:51.973+0200", "updated": "2025-12-21T18:58:09.513+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/21/2025", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "Email address:tal.sharon@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Can't open any invoice or credit note in NS Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Billing & CollectionFinance Area:BillingBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:NoSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Open any invoice or credit note, an error message is shown and the page cannot be open. Error message attached Expected Behavior:we need to be able to view any credit note ort invoice without errors Actual Behavior:see error messages attached Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9791", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Quote is intermittently deleted from Opportunity before close", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-21T17:08:13.173+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T07:30:43.477+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "Email address:shahar.reich@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Quote is intermittently deleted from Opportunity before closeYour Department:MISBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:NoSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:1. Create an Opportunity with an associated Quote2. At an unknown point, the associated Quote is deleted and moved to the Recycle BinNo consistent or reproducible pattern has been identified.The deletion may be related to user or Workato permissions on the Quote object, but this has not yet been confirmed.Expected Behavior:The Quote should remain associated with the Opportunity and should not be deleted unless explicitly deleted by a user or an intentional automated process.Actual Behavior:The Quote is unexpectedly deleted and moved to the Recycle Bin.In some cases, the deletion is attributed to Workato, and in other cases to a specific user, without a clear or consistent trigger.Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9781", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Special Company Search", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-21T13:53:51.743+0200", "updated": "2026-01-15T11:49:52.732+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "1/15/2026", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "Email address:lilia.levin@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Special Company Search Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:TaxBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Hi DanielAfter Yaniv correct the search, please add to payment type also JE's against bank and IC against banksExpected Behavior:should be added to searchActual Behavior:Not appearsIs there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9776", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - forcast non payroll - wrong calcuation on tcv product", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-21T12:53:14.681+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T16:29:56.790+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "tcv product use case2 - need to be calculated based on pop\nuse case 2 - forecast , non payroll\nΣ (POP.TCV_LINE)\n\nfor example\n OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006UH000001IV3GYAW'\nand PRODUCT_CODE ='Growth_FY23Q1'\nwe expect to see 53.9 k but we get 28\n\n\n\nselect OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE\n from UAT_DWH.INT.INT_UNION_READINESS_PREP_POP\nwhere OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006UH000001IV3GYAW'\nand PRODUCT_CODE ='Growth_FY23Q1'\n\nselect COMPANY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n NUMBER_OF_EES,\n NET_PRICE,\n NET_PRICE * 12,\n NET_PRICE * OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n TCV_LINE\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_POP\nwhere OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006UH000001IV3GYAW'\nand PRODUCT_CODE ='Growth_FY23Q1'\nand DATE_ID in ('2025-03-31','2026-03-31')\nand REVENUE_TYPE ='arr'\n\nselect\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n QUANTITY_MONTH_EE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n OPPORTUNITY_DURATION,\n NUMBER_OF_EE_CALC,\n TCV_PRODUCT\n\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nwhere SOURCE = 'mosaic'\nand OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006UH000001IV3GYAW'" }, { "key": "BT-9769", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - forcast non payroll - wrong quantity month ee", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-21T11:51:33.224+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T16:29:45.895+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "forcast non payroll\nsupposed to calcuate the quantity month ee from pop - use case 2 - see stt\n\nexample value is 49.98\nexpected to be 24.99\nselect\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n QUANTITY_MONTH_EE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n OPPORTUNITY_DURATION,\n NUMBER_OF_EE_CALC\n\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nwhere SOURCE = 'mosaic'\nand OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006UH000001IV3GYAW'\n\nselect COMPANY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n NUMBER_OF_EES\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_POP\nwhere OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006UH000001IV3GYAW'\nand PRODUCT_CODE ='Growth_FY23Q1'\nand DATE_ID in ('2025-03-31','2026-03-31')\nand REVENUE_TYPE ='arr'" }, { "key": "BT-9768", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - DIM_OPPORTUNITY_LINE - wrong PRODUCT_LINE_RANK ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Ben Rosenzweig", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-21T10:56:50.483+0200", "updated": "2025-12-29T09:35:09.113+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/29/2025", "daysOpen": 119, "description": "warr solution is based on input from DIM_OPPORTUNITY_LINE\nwe found out the in some cases the PRODUCT_LINE_RANK is wrong\n\nthe key of PRODUCT_LINE_RANK calculation was updated\nand it need to be \nOPPORTUNITY_ID + PRODUCT_CODE + + usage_ind+ OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE_Cstt" }, { "key": "BT-9767", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Exclude Company Legal Number validation form Renewal lines ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Yoad Shary", "created": "2025-12-21T10:24:06.982+0200", "updated": "2025-12-21T17:13:14.909+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/21/2025", "daysOpen": 120, "description": "Exclude the Company Legal Number validation form, Renewal lines The validation need to be only on NB and Upsell We will update the validation on the opp level" }, { "key": "BT-9766", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Exclude t&c From US/Uk Payroll Validation ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Yoad Shary", "created": "2025-12-21T10:22:14.306+0200", "updated": "2025-12-21T17:12:51.649+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/21/2025", "daysOpen": 120, "description": "We are getting errors when we have a T&C Contract for us/uk payroll, \n\nWe need to update the opp line flow to exclude those lines" }, { "key": "BT-9762", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - payroll customer - missing value in active ee", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Stanislav Livshyn", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-21T09:42:00.232+0200", "updated": "2025-12-29T09:29:34.796+0200", "createdDate": "12/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/29/2025", "daysOpen": 120, "description": "missing values in ACTIVE_EE_NEW field , supposed to take value from pop\n\nIn addition I recommend to change the name to ACTIVE_EE as appears in stt - please ask Limor approval , and if you change update the linage of the field\n\n for example\n select w.OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n w.COMPANY_ID,\n w.PRODUCT_CODE,\n u.OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n u.CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n w.ACTIVE_EE_NEW,\n w.TCV_PRODUCT,\n w.QUANTITY_MONTH_EE\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR w\n inner join UAT_DWH.INT.INT_UNION_READINESS_PREP_POP u\n on w.OPPORTUNITY_ID = u.OPPORTUNITY_ID\n and w.PRODUCT_CODE=u.PRODUCT_CODE\n where w.MODEL_TYPE = 'actual'\n and w.PRODUCT_FAMILY = 'Payroll'\n --and ACTIVE_EE_NEW is not null\n\n\n select COMPANY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n DATE_ID,\n ACTIVE_EES,\n NUMBER_OF_EES\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_POP\n where COMPANY_ID = '637522'\n and PRODUCT_CODE = 'UKP0001'\n and DATE_ID = '2025-06-01'\n and MODEL_TYPE = 'actual'\n and REVENUE_TYPE = 'arr'" }, { "key": "BT-9759", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - DealHub quote not pulling full contract length", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-19T17:03:20.898+0200", "updated": "2025-12-20T16:59:01.648+0200", "createdDate": "12/19/2025", "updatedDate": "12/20/2025", "daysOpen": 121, "description": "Email address:hannah.brayshaw@hibob.ioIssue Summary:DealHub quote not pulling full contract lengthYour Department:Customer GrowthBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:YesSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Citizen M (AS operations Holdings)- Premium Support UpsellI have recreate a new quote, and even created a new upsell work, no change.every premium support quote is only letting the upsell run until June 30th 2026, the customer contract runs until September 2027.Module to start Jan 2nd 2026Expected Behavior:Running until sept 2027Actual Behavior:Running until June 2026Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://app.dealhub.io/cpq/pyn1MwvhoeHyd4B6/LyMvcXVvdGVHZW5lcmF0aW9uX25ldz9xdW90ZUdVSUQ9cGNFaEh5OVEyajVQNW9LZiZtb2RlPXZpZXdFZGl0Jm9wTmFtZT1jaXRpemVuTStIb3RlbHMrUHJlbWl1bStVcHNlbGwrMjAyNSZxdE5hbWU9Q2l0aXplbitNK1ByZW1pdW0rU3VwcG9ydCZvcD1OMFJIY2NyMGpaNG9PVEtFJm9wU3JjPU9XTkVS———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9745", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Bug-Bob Finance Metrics", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-18T16:59:14.622+0200", "updated": "2025-12-19T16:06:30.866+0200", "createdDate": "12/18/2025", "updatedDate": "12/19/2025", "daysOpen": 122, "description": "Email address:martin.briones@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Bug-Bob Finance MetricsYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Mosaic/Bob FinanceSteps to Reproduce:We are seeing an issue with the Bob Finance MRR Min EEs when we try to do a calculation. An example is on the link below. Clients have a min MRR of 1300GBP and the ARPU is 4.54. The Min EEs that its showing is 173. When we do our own calculation (1300/4.54) we get ~286 EEs. Is there something we are missing? We need to understand how the calculations work as there are times where we need to manually add a product and we need to know how these are calculated.Expected Behavior:Error in calculations Actual Behavior:Outputting incorrect number. Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/OpportunityLineItem/00kVg00000L168vIAB/view———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9742", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - wrong bucket value - expect to be downlift appears as flat", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-18T15:25:19.231+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T15:48:47.996+0200", "createdDate": "12/18/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 122, "description": "the following case expect to be downlift , apperas as flat \nPREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU > WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_ARR_PRODUCT\n\n select COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n PRODUCT_FAMILY,\n PREVIOUS_WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_ARPU,\n WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_ARPU,\n IS_ACTIVE_PRODUCT,\n \"START\",\n UPSELL,\n UPLIFT,\n DOWNSELL,\n DOWNLIFT\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_BUCKETS\n where MODEL_TYPE = 'actual'\n and PRODUCT_CODE = 'SAN001'\nand COMPANY_ID ='636895'\nand REVENUE_TYPE = 'carr'\n and DATE_ID = '2025-12-11'\n\n\nselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n USAGE_IND,\n PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU,\n WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_ARR_PRODUCT,\n BUCKET_NAME,\n BUCKET_VALUE\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nwhere OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006Vg00000PojpxIAB'\nand PRODUCT_CODE = 'SAN001'\nand COMPANY_ID ='636895'" }, { "key": "BT-9741", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Problem with the periods on the amendment quote", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-18T15:15:34.064+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T10:06:40.984+0200", "createdDate": "12/18/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 122, "description": "Email address:sima.kovarsky@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Problem with the periods on the amendment quoteYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:I’m trying to create a quote for an EE reduction and ARPU change. We’re currently in period 4 of the customer’s contract, but the quote is applying the changes to other periods instead of maintaining continuity with the existing period.Expected Behavior:The changes should only appear on period 4Actual Behavior:the quote is applying the changes to other periods instead of maintaining continuity with the existing period.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease "2025-12-22T13:27:25.390+0200", "createdDate": "12/18/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 122, "description": "for example first appearance of the product\nexpected to be upsell\nappear as flat\n\nselect COMPANY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n USAGE_IND,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n CLOSE_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n\n from UAT_DWH.INT.INT_UNION_READINESS_PREP_POP\nwhere OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006Vg00000LtHTxIAN'\n--and PRODUCT_CODE = 'UKP0001'\n\n\nselect\n DATE_ID,\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n USAGE_IND,\n IS_ACTIVE_USAGE_IND\nfrom UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_POP\nwhere COMPANY_ID = '640373'\nand PRODUCT_CODE = 'UBA0001'\n--and USAGE_IND = '562295532562295532'\norder by date_id\n\n\n*** comment also in payroll usage ind can be null ( will be only single record in that case )" }, { "key": "BT-9736", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Fact_wa_arr - wrong value for and 'ACCOUNT_STATUS_LEGACY' for source='mosaic'\n\nselect distinct\n wa.company_id,\n wa.account_status,\n P.ACCOUNT_STATUS_BOB,\n P.ACCOUNT_STATUS_LEGACY\nfrom uat_DWH.waterfall.fact_wa_arr wa\nleft join uat_dwh.int.int_union_readiness_prep_pop P \n on WA.COMPANY_ID=P.COMPANY_ID\nwhere 1=1 \n --and PRODUCT_FAMILY = 'Payroll'\n and WA.company_id='001Vg00000QYS69IAH'" }, { "key": "BT-9731", values being mis-parsed to 'None' and 'True/False'.Exmaple response:{\n\t\"body\": {\n\t\t\"opportunity.quoted_min_ee_s\": 435,\n\t\t\"opportunity.synced_quote_id\": Onclusive_copy\",\n\t\t\"opportunity.synced_quote.quote_id\": \"HB-121070\",\n\t\t\"opportunity.synced_quote.status\": \"Won\",\n\t\t\"opportunity.synced_quote.is_syncing\": \"Upsell\",\n\t\t\"opportunity.id\": \"006Vg00000GsqTRIAZ\",\n\t\t\"opportunity.opportunity_id\": \"058395\",\n\t\t\"opportunity.name\": \"Onclusive WFP and T&A Upsell 2025\",\n\t\t\"opportunity.close_date\": \"2025-06-30\",\n\t\t\"opportunity.amount\": 160809.3000719,\n\t\t\"opportunity.total_unit_net_price\": 5.82,\n\t\t\"opportunity.tiered_deal\": false,\n\t\t\"opportunity.deal_desk_additional_conditions\": \"HiBob hereby agrees to waive the Customer’s payment obligations for the subscription fee for the Workforce Planning module for the first 2 (two) months of the Customer's current subscription term commencing August 1, 2025. For clarity's sake, payment obligations for the Workforce Planning module shall begin as of October 1, 2025.

 

 

The Customer’s subscription to the Time & Attendance module is solely for Authorized Users designated by the “France, Spain, Italy and Germany values specified in the Site field in the Customer’s account in the Platform. Module-specific Authorized Users shall be billed based on the number of such users, in accordance with the following criteria, as of the billing date.

Site equals “France, Spain, Italy and Germany
£1.82 per month per user
Minimum Subscription - 435 Authorized Users

 For clarity's sake, Workforce Planning shall be billed for all 1200 minimum authorized users and the customer's subscription to all current modules shall remain unchanged.
