Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9670", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - missing records for payroll ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-17T14:04:29.995+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T13:06:13.317+0200", "createdDate": "12/17/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 123, "description": "missing records for payroll\nexists in int union readiness , does not exist in fact waarr\n\nselect distinct\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE ,\n STAGE_NAME ,\n USAGE_IND\n\n , CLOSE_DATE, CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP::date\n\n from UAT_DWH.INT.INT_UNION_READINESS_PREP_POP\nwhere coalesce(CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,CLOSE_DATE) >= '2023-01-01'\n and nvl(TEMPORARY_DOWNSELL,false) = false\nand PRODUCT_FAMILY = 'Payroll'\n and SOURCE<>'pento'\nand ( MODEL_TYPE = 'actual' or ACCOUNT_STATUS_BOB not ilike '%churn%')\n\nminus\nselect distinct\n OPPORTUNITY_ID, PRODUCT_CODE,\n STAGE_NAME,\n USAGE_IND_WARR\n ,\n CLOSE_DATE, CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP::date\n --, CHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR" }, { "key": "BT-9669", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Integration bug in Netsuite on Po not matching bill from VC (payem)", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-17T13:57:27.236+0200", "updated": "2026-01-01T16:07:38.274+0200", "createdDate": "12/17/2025", "updatedDate": "1/1/2026", "daysOpen": 123, "description": "Email address:alex.duhovny@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Integration bug in Netsuite on Po not matching bill from VC (payem)Your Department:MISBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Integration bug in Netsuite on Po not matching bill from VC (payem)Expected Behavior:Bill is linked to PO via Payem cardActual Behavior:n Po not matching bill from VC (payem)Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9668", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - missing population for non payroll - 1st priority", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-17T13:55:39.054+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T13:06:04.830+0200", "createdDate": "12/17/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 123, "description": "we have opportunities that exists in union readiness , but does not exist in fact wa arr ( non payroll) - we have cases of actual and forecast\n\n\nfor example \nOPPORTUNITY_ID = '006Vg00000Jaji4IAB'\nand PRODUCT_CODE = 'COR0001'\n\n\n\nselect distinct\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE ,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n STAGE_NAME\n ,\n CLOSE_DATE,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP::date\n\n from UAT_DWH.INT.INT_UNION_READINESS_PREP_POP\nwhere coalesce(CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,CLOSE_DATE) >= '2023-01-01'\n and nvl(TEMPORARY_DOWNSELL,false) = false\nand PRODUCT_FAMILY <> 'Payroll'\nand ( MODEL_TYPE = 'actual' or ACCOUNT_STATUS_BOB not ilike '%churn%')\n\nminus\nselect distinct\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n STAGE_NAME\n ,\n CLOSE_DATE, CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP::date\n --, CHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR" }, { "key": "BT-9664", "project": "BT", "summary": "FACT WA ARR - duplicate records , seems that are all forecast with ee eligability , non payroll - 2nd priority", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-17T13:40:18.910+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T13:07:28.457+0200", "createdDate": "12/17/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 123, "description": "we have duplicate records in fact wa arr\nseems that all are forecast with ee eligability group\nonly payroll customer are expected to have diffrent record per usage ind\n\nselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n USAGE_IND_WARR,\n EE_ELIGIBILITY,\n count(*)\n\nfrom UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\n\ngroup by COMPANY_ID, OPPORTUNITY_ID, PRODUCT_CODE, USAGE_IND_WARR,MODEL_TYPE, EE_ELIGIBILITY\nhaving count(*) >1" }, { "key": "BT-9662", "project": "BT", "summary": "RELEVANT_FOR_COMMISSION for downlift in MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - 2nd priority", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-17T13:17:51.984+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T14:39:21.273+0200", "createdDate": "12/17/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 123, "description": "any downlift source in the waterfall when product family = 'Payroll' should be set as relevant for commision = true\n\n select * from DEV_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP\n where WARR_SOURCE = 'waterfall'\n and BUCKET_NAME = 'Downlift'\n and PRODUCT_FAMILY = 'Payroll'\n and RELEVANT_FOR_COMMISSION = false\n\nmay issue of key sensitive on product family" }, { "key": "BT-9660", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - x2 Renewal Quotes not Syncing to SFDC", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-17T12:47:47.188+0200", "updated": "2025-12-19T10:06:16.762+0200", "createdDate": "12/17/2025", "updatedDate": "12/19/2025", "daysOpen": 123, "description": "Email address:emma.pearse@hibob.ioIssue Summary:x2 Renewal Quotes not Syncing to SFDCYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Not sureExpected Behavior:Primary quote in DealHub should sync to SFDC with no problemsActual Behavior:x2 different renewal quotes have incurred a syncing issue. Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob--dealhub.vf.force.com/apex/DealHub?param=Quotes&OpportunityId=006Vg00000CqgkDIAR&isdtp=mn———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9639", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Special Company Search", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Yaniv Cohen", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-17T11:19:23.481+0200", "updated": "2025-12-23T11:39:59.116+0200", "createdDate": "12/17/2025", "updatedDate": "12/23/2025", "daysOpen": 123, "description": "Email address:lilia.levin@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Special Company SearchYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:AdministrationBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Special Company Search - we are using to identify new foreign vendors and to fill the form for Tax authorities, and for today this search represent incorrect data.This issue is very critical for as we must to report the data till this end of week so we have confirmation to Bank for make a payment to foreign vendors. Expected Behavior:To have a search with correct dataActual Behavior:Today the search is duplicate all the lines and show more higher amount than in actual.Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9635", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Autocash - Stripe - Not recognizing Stripe and the come to the Failed Items", "status": "Rejected", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-17T10:49:23.227+0200", "updated": "2026-01-22T13:01:02.479+0200", "createdDate": "12/17/2025", "updatedDate": "1/22/2026", "daysOpen": 123, "description": "Email address:inbal.vromen@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Autocash - Stripe - Not recognizing Stripe and the come to the Failed Items Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Billing & CollectionFinance Area:Auto cashCollectionBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:The Autocash stopped recognizing all the Stripe payments that come from the bank.. I dealt with about 8 of them yesterday. See example: https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/common/custom/custrecordentry.nl?rectype=1189&id=276688&scrollid=276688&whence=Expected Behavior:The Autocash stopped recognizing all the Stripe payments that come from the bank.. I dealt with about 8 of them yesterday. See example: https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/common/custom/custrecordentry.nl?rectype=1189&id=276688&scrollid=276688&whence=Actual Behavior:The Autocash stopped recognizing all the Stripe payments that come from the bank.. I dealt with about 8 of them yesterday. See example: https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/common/custom/custrecordentry.nl?rectype=1189&id=276688&scrollid=276688&whence=Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/common/custom/custrecordentry.nl?rectype=1189&id=276688&scrollid=276688&whence=———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9616", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - fact_bob_jobs - BUG", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ben Rosenzweig", "reporter": "Tamar Dufour Dror", "created": "2025-12-16T12:55:51.383+0200", "updated": "2025-12-31T09:40:57.054+0200", "createdDate": "12/16/2025", "updatedDate": "12/31/2025", "daysOpen": 124, "description": "PROD_DWH.HR_FPNA.Fact_bob_jobs – The column JOB_CODE includes an incorrect code for employees who have multiple codes in their job field. Please use only the value in the last set of brackets.\nFor example:\nFor the value \"Executives (C level) (11) Chief Information Officer Executive MIS (J-3082954994)\", the JOB_CODE should be J-3082954994, not 11 (as it is currently).\n\noption of solution:\nwith final as (\n select wh.employee_id,\n json_data:\"history\":\"effectiveDate\"::date as effective_date,\n json_data:\"history\":\"employee\":\"jobProfileId\":\"historicalChangedBy\"::varchar as changed_by_id,\n--- NEW FROM HERE-----\nreverse(\n regexp_substr(\n reverse(json_data:\"humanReadable\":\"history\":\"employee\":\"jobProfileId\":\"historicalValue\"),\n '\\\\)([^()]*)\\\\(',1,1,'e')\n--- NEW END ------\n) AS job_code, json_data:\"humanReadable\":\"history\":\"work\":\"title\":\"historicalValue\"::varchar as title,\n jp.job_profile_id,\n jp.job_title,\n jp.job_status,\n jp.job_role,\n jp.job_role_id,\n jp.job_family_group,\n jp.job_family_group_id,\n jp.job_family,\n jp.job_family_id,\n jp.job_level_role,\n jp.job_level_role_id,\n jp.job_function,\n\n convert_timezone('UTC', current_timestamp) as dwh_inserted_at,\n convert_timezone('UTC', current_timestamp) as dwh_updated_at\n\n from prod_datalake_db.bob_api.employee_job_work_history wh\n left join PROD_DWH.hr_fpna.dim_bob_job_profiles jp\n on job_code = jp.job_profile_code\n)\n\nselect *\nfrom final" }, { "key": "BT-9614", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Zafir was able to open a rejected Dispute case", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shiran Guberman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-16T12:40:48.598+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T15:33:48.397+0200", "createdDate": "12/16/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 124, "description": "Email address:einat.pick@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Zafir was able to open a rejected Dispute caseYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:CommissionsFinance Area:CommissionsBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:As shown in the history, Zafir was able to change the status of this case from Rejected to In progress.Expected Behavior:Users shouldn't be able to change case status after it was closed.Actual Behavior:Zafir was able to do it.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Case/500Vg00000Vfo0mIAB/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FReport%2F00OVg00000KL8qHMAT%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9570", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - quarter calculation for waterfall bucket churn should be based on date id", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-14T19:33:14.227+0200", "updated": "2025-12-17T15:43:24.333+0200", "createdDate": "12/14/2025", "updatedDate": "12/17/2025", "daysOpen": 126, "description": "The quarter calculation is as following\n\n'Q'||QUARTER([Date])'/'||year([Date])\n[date] logic: \nfor bucket_name = 'Churn' date_id (new)\nfor model_type = 'actual' then CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP \nelse CLOSE_DATE (exists)" }, { "key": "BT-9562", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - need to bring the value from FACT_WA_ARR\nfor source - waterfall - need to bring the value from waterfall daily" }, { "key": "BT-9539", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - missing records in .MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP , source FACT_WA_ARR - priority 1", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-14T11:32:25.339+0200", "updated": "2025-12-17T15:44:12.498+0200", "createdDate": "12/14/2025", "updatedDate": "12/17/2025", "daysOpen": 126, "description": "excepted results all opps exists in FACT_WA_ARR need to exists also in MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP\n\nactual results, many opps are missing\n\nselect\n distinct\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n USAGE_IND_WARR\n\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nminus\nselect distinct\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n USAGE_IND\n from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP" }, { "key": "BT-9538", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP - missing waterfall opps - priority. 2", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-14T11:13:18.641+0200", "updated": "2025-12-17T15:43:54.266+0200", "createdDate": "12/14/2025", "updatedDate": "12/17/2025", "daysOpen": 126, "description": "uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP table should include all waterfall opps and churn cases, not all records exists\n\nselect\n distinct\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE\n from\n UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_DAILY\nwhere ((NEW_BUSINESS IS NOT NULL\nOR UPSELL IS NOT NULL\nOR UPLIFT IS NOT NULL\nOR DOWNSELL IS NOT NULL\nOR DOWNLIFT IS NOT NULL\nOR CHURN IS NOT NULL)\nor coalesce (CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP , close_date ) = date_id )\nAND REVENUE_TYPE = 'carr'\nminus\nselect distinct\n COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE\n from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WARR_WATERFALL_AND_OPP" }, { "key": "BT-9534", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Customer HR team unable to access Zendesk help center following merge of organizations in SF", "status": "Rejected", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Dori Mitrani", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-14T10:43:03.233+0200", "updated": "2026-04-19T08:23:27.073+0300", "createdDate": "12/14/2025", "updatedDate": "4/19/2026", "daysOpen": 126, "description": "Email address:nathan.lowe@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Customer HR team unable to access Zendesk help center following merge of organizations in SFYour Department:CSBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:NoSystems Involved:ZendeskDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:We have an urgent issue where users aren't able to access the Help Centeradm Promotions UK Limited and Indicia two separate organizations if sf, merged their operations and it appears that a new account record was created: ADM PROMOTIONS UK LIMITEDBut now no one from adm has no access helpcenter - this has been open for over a month and no solution provided has worked. Currently heavily affecting the customers HR operationsWe've tried a number of trouble shooting issues with the customer and it's become urgent for themUpdating domains in SF and ZDDeleting ZD profiles and manually creating new onesDifferent browsersConfirmed no IT restrictions (it's specific to old adm account users, not all ADM users)Expected Behavior:All customers should have access to the help centerActual Behavior:Currently when they click to access the help center they land on a simple white page with our logo and that's itIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.zendesk.com/agent/tickets/326807———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9530", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Unable to edit start date for talent module", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-14T09:26:23.284+0200", "updated": "2025-12-17T17:54:01.715+0200", "createdDate": "12/14/2025", "updatedDate": "12/17/2025", "daysOpen": 127, "description": "Email address:jean.felix@hibob.ioIssue Summary:I am trying to do a start date change for January 5th for the Talent module. I tried deleting those line items but I cannot delete line items that is in sync because I can't C&T it. I've tried some work arounds but they did not work. Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9475", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr , in case the gap between current tcv and prev tcv is less then 0.1 count as flat not uplift , downlift", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-10T17:47:12.024+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T09:18:42.105+0200", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "for example in this case \n\n\n\nselect COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_TYPE,\n BUCKET_NAME,\n PRODUCT_FAMILY,\n PAYROLL_CUSTOMER,\n USAGE_IND,\n USAGE_IND_WARR,\n EE_ELIGIBILITY,\n NUMBER_OF_EE_CALC,\n ACTIVE_EE_NEW,\n QUANTITY_MONTH_EE,\n WA_ARR_ARPU,\n PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU,\n TCV_PRODUCT,\n TCV_PRODUCT_PREV_WA_ARPU\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nwhere COMPANY_ID = '633385'\nand OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006Vg000009VNw1IAG'\nand PRODUCT_CODE = 'COR0001'\n\n\n\n\nTCV PRODUCT = 9831.36\nAND PREV TCV PRODUCT IS 9831.359999999999\nIT APPEAR AS UPLIFT\nneed to be flat" }, { "key": "BT-9471", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr ee eligability = true is not expected in product family payroll", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-10T17:28:19.012+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T11:41:08.736+0200", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "see example\nselect COMPANY_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n PRODUCT_FAMILY,\n PAYROLL_CUSTOMER,\n USAGE_IND,\n USAGE_IND_WARR,\n EE_ELIGIBILITY\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nwhere COMPANY_ID = '633385'\nand OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006Vg000009VNw1IAG'" }, { "key": "BT-9470", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Assistance with Cloning or manually creating US payroll lines", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Idan Brand", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-10T17:18:18.691+0200", "updated": "2026-02-25T17:09:33.066+0200", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "2/25/2026", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "Email address:martin.briones@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Assistance with Cloning or manually creating US payroll linesYour Department:FP&ABusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:NoSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:We need to have the ability to create lines manually for US payroll/BenAdmin. Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9456", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - bucket value calcuation ", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-10T15:13:48.698+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T09:18:30.225+0200", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "the bucket value calcuation in case of uplift downlift need to be\n (opp_product_warr.TCV_PRODUCT-opp_product_warr.TCV_PRODUCT_PREV_WA_ARPU)/OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION *12\n\nexample to test ( not working now )\n select * from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\n where OPPORTUNITY_ID = '0067S00000A8LCmQAN'\n and PRODUCT_CODE = 'COR0001'" }, { "key": "BT-9455", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9454", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Validation for Company Legal Number in DH does not properly prevent non-numeric values when spaces are included", "status": "On Hold", "priority": "Low", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-10T15:04:07.355+0200", "updated": "2026-03-23T12:53:41.443+0200", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "3/23/2026", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "Email address:shahar.reich@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Validation for Company Legal Number in DH does not properly prevent non-numeric values when spaces are includedYour Department:MISBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:NoSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:1. Create quote in DH2. Add the Payroll product3. In the Company Legal Number field, enter letters with a space (e.g., \"Bloom & Wild\")4. Attempt to proceed.Expected Behavior:The validation should block the user from proceeding with the quote when the value contains only alphabetic characters and a space, and should not allow moving to the next step. Currently, the validation works when the value contains only letters with no space, but it should also prevent progressing when letters with a space are entered.Actual Behavior:The validation does not trigger when letters are entered with a space, allowing users to submit non-numeric values. This often leads to users entering the Company Legal Name instead of the Company Legal Number, causing downstream data issues.Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9452", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Issue with prepayment run in Secondary book", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-10T14:34:37.580+0200", "updated": "2025-12-15T19:36:37.813+0200", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "12/15/2025", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "Email address:anh.le@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Issue with prepayment run in Secondary bookYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:Month end closeBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:In Netsuite -> Transactions -> Financial -> Create Amortization Journal Entries -> create journal for HB HR, primary and then secondary book.Expected Behavior:A credit to AP and debit to Prepaid Expenses to be applied for both Primary and Secondary BookActual Behavior:Invoice 54453 from 22843 MPH Enterprises Ltd (HBHR), the expected behaviour only applied for Primary Book. In secondary book the invoice went straight to P&L.Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9449", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr ,verify arr calcuation ", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-10T13:43:04.718+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T09:18:28.038+0200", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "arr calcuation need to be done by \nTCV_PRODUCT/OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION*12\n\nis some cases not working\nfor example\n select * from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\n where OPPORTUNITY_ID = '0067S000006Mu8jQAC'\n and PRODUCT_CODE = 'WFP0001'" }, { "key": "BT-9448", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - WA ARR - wrong value of CHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE for mosaic customer", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-10T13:38:12.393+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T11:47:57.972+0200", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "per STT - ‘CHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE’ field should take ‘CHURN_REQUEST_EFFECTIVE_DATE’ from FACT_MOSAIC_LEGACY_POP_READINESS only when account_status = 'churn'.in the below case the account_status is ‘Customer’ and I still get a value for ‘CHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE’select distinctcompany_id,model_type,source,churn_effective_date,account_statusfrom uat_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARRwhere company_id='001Vg00000QYGeZIAX' and model_type='actual' and source='mosaic' and CHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE is not nullCOMPANY_IDMODEL_TYPESOURCECHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATEACCOUNT_STATUS001Vg00000QYGeZIAXactualmosaic2026-04-14Customer" }, { "key": "BT-9445", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Not able to close an upsell opp", "status": "Rejected", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-10T13:30:17.308+0200", "updated": "2026-04-19T08:23:51.593+0300", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "4/19/2026", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "Email address:dor.blum@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Not able to close an upsell oppYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:try to close won the oppExpected Behavior:should be able to close the oppActual Behavior:getting an error saying the start date is before the contract start date which is not trueIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006Vg00000Q0D9aIAF/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F0011v00001tKwzkAAC%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9440", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Production - WTFL - forecast - update PREVIOUS_IS_DUMMY_CORE_forecast logic ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Stanislav Livshyn", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-10T12:06:35.148+0200", "updated": "2025-12-22T13:22:58.511+0200", "createdDate": "12/10/2025", "updatedDate": "12/22/2025", "daysOpen": 130, "description": "need to update the logic of PREVIOUS_IS_DUMMY_CORE_forecast - as today it’s cousing to wrong bucket.current logic we asked in STT: where model_type ='forecast' -check the previous day:If previous day we has 'forecast' record take the forcast record and calculate the lag:lag(Is_Dummy_Core) over (partition by revenue_type,model_type, company_id, product_code order by date_id)Else take the actual record and calculate the lag:lag(Is_Dummy_Core) over (partition by revenue_type, company_id, product_code order by date_id)need to be changed to → when model_type ='forecast' -check the previous day:If previous day we have 'actual' record take the actual record and calculate the lag:lag(Is_Dummy_Core) over (partition by revenue_type, company_id, product_code order by date_id)If previous day we have 'forecast' and there was no 'actual' record for that partition,then take the forcast record and calculate the lag:lag(Is_Dummy_Core) over (partition by revenue_type,model_type, company_id, product_code order by date_id)It’s actually to change the order - so in case of model_type='forecast' when we have a record for the same company, same revenue type, same date and same product → a record in model_type ='actual' in the previous day → then the is_dummy_core of the previous day should be taken from the actual record.in case we of model_type='forecast' but there’s no record of ‘actual’ on the previuos day for the partition - then the is_dummy_core of the previous day for that record should be taken from the ‘forecast’ record" }, { "key": "BT-9412", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Error in sending the PO", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-09T15:45:31.320+0200", "updated": "2026-01-05T12:15:58.901+0200", "createdDate": "12/9/2025", "updatedDate": "1/5/2026", "daysOpen": 131, "description": "Email address:batel.zamir@hibob.ioPriority Level:High (blocking critical procurement processes)Request Type:Technical IssueWhich area is your request related to?:Purchase orderVendor detailsPR number/Vendor name/PO number:N/ADescribe Your Request:I can't send the PO to the vendor.———————————————This task was submitted through Zip Support https://form.asana.com/?k=Zoh9UFaD-TSKjjc6jWpSWQ&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9401", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - issue in query", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Matan Shachaf", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-09T14:28:39.812+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T21:20:13.644+0200", "createdDate": "12/9/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 131, "description": "Email address:aviram.nasimi@hibob.ioIssue Summary:issue in queryYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:CommissionsFinance Area:CommissionsBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:CaptivateIQDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Something strange in QUERY I see DD in the First Stage Labs FZ - LLC account and I can't find it in WTRFExpected Behavior:no DD in First Stage Labs FZ - LLC accountActual Behavior:there is a DD in First Stage Labs FZ - LLC accountIs there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9388", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - PREVIOUS_OPPORTUNITY_ID is not required in fact wa arr and even if exists is wrong ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-09T12:47:29.372+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T11:40:58.699+0200", "createdDate": "12/9/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 131, "description": "please remove field PREVIOUS_OPPORTUNITY_ID" }, { "key": "BT-9384", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Unable to update billing contact email address - INTERNATIONAL POLE AND LINE FOUNDATION", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-09T10:55:39.435+0200", "updated": "2025-12-11T09:55:51.800+0200", "createdDate": "12/9/2025", "updatedDate": "12/11/2025", "daysOpen": 131, "description": "Email address:krishna.kandasamy@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Unable to update billing contact email address - INTERNATIONAL POLE AND LINE FOUNDATIONYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Billing & CollectionFinance Area:BillingBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:To update the primary billing email address to mecheal.wickham@ipnlf.org Secondary billing contact to helena.geyvanpittius@ipnlf.org Expected Behavior:To update the billing contactActual Behavior:Billing contact did not get updated, please see error message screenshot. Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/0011v00002twrdsAAA/view———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9374", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - wrong value in QUANTITY_MONTH_EE (in case of opps change)", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-09T07:03:23.076+0200", "updated": "2025-12-11T13:47:41.968+0200", "createdDate": "12/9/2025", "updatedDate": "12/11/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "please note that the calcuation of QUANTITY_MONTH_EEneed to be done using the OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE of the opportunity idbut the opportunity_id on pop can be diffrent - therefore, you need to join pop by account id and not opportunity onlythis is a valid business scenario , the commision need to be payed on the original opps event if it was replaced - was verified and approved by the businessfor exampleselect * from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nwhere OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006Vg00000BAVQnIAP'\n\n\nselect r.ACCOUNT_ID,\n r.OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n DATE_ID,\n REVENUE_TYPE,\n r.CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n r.PRODUCT_CODE,\n r.OPPORTUNITY_LINE_ID,\n r.RENEWAL_LINE_TYPE,\n r.OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n r.OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n NUMBER_OF_EES,\n p.NET_PRICE,\n r.OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_DURATION,\n TCV_LINE,\n p.USAGE_IND,\n p.ACCOUNT_CHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_POP p\n inner join\n UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_BOB_POP_READINESS r\n on p.ACCOUNT_id = r.ACCOUNT_ID\nwhere 1=1\n and r.OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006Vg00000BAVQnIAP'\n and r.PRODUCT_CODE = 'COM0001'\n\nand r.COMPANY_ID = '638111'\n\nand (DATE_ID = r.OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE and REVENUE_TYPE = 'arr')" }, { "key": "BT-9369", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Meeting Followup date - Auto Completion Bug", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yuval Matus", "reporter": "Ben Ben-David", "created": "2025-12-08T19:54:24.089+0200", "updated": "2025-12-14T13:45:11.000+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/14/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "Please check this record - https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Meeting__c/a1PVg000003gNOHMA2/view and the following email Error element Mark_the_Meeting_as_Completed (FlowRecordUpdate).The flow tried to update these records: a1PVg000003gNOHMA2. This error occurred: FIELD_CUSTOM_VALIDATION_EXCEPTION: You cannot set more than 90 days count on a follow-up date field.. You can look up ExceptionCode values in the SOAP API Developer Guide.An Error Occurred with Your \"Meeting – Daily Scheduler – Meetings Stuck in “Created” Status / Meeting Auto-Completion / Needs to Be Rescheduled (No Activity) - Move to Nurture\" FlowPlease check if follow-up date was needed to be deleted here or we need to exclude meeting auto-compleation from validation. Changeset-https://essentials.copado.com/app/#/Flows/1753270" }, { "key": "BT-9367", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Docusign with Dealroom integration is triggering David for signature first in some instances", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Guy Levin", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-08T18:32:35.653+0200", "updated": "2025-12-10T13:19:37.680+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/10/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "Email address:emma.pearse@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Docusign with Dealroom integration is triggering David for signature first in some instancesYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:LowRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Docusign integration with DealroomSteps to Reproduce:Not sureExpected Behavior:David Sussely should always be the second signer and customer firstActual Behavior:David Sussely is triggered first in some use casesIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://go-dealroom.dealhub.io/dealhub#!/hub?dealGUID=1CljgDumYlfVSkoI———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9365", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr- wrong value in PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-08T18:03:22.075+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T09:17:33.326+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "select\n COMPANY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n DATE_ID,\n WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_ARPU,\n PREVIOUS_WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_ARPU,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_BUCKETS\n where 1=1\n-- and OPPORTUNITY_ID = '0067S000007xOLRQA2'\n and PRODUCT_CODE = 'PAY0001'\n and DATE_ID = '2023-02-06'\n and ACCOUNT_ID ='0017S000002LNvsQAG'\n and REVENUE_TYPE = 'carr'see the below example - the expectation is that the prev arpu will be 2.78and the result is 0select OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n OPPORTUNITY_TYPE,\n TCV_PRODUCT,\n QUANTITY_MONTH_EE,\n WA_ARR_ARPU,\n PREVIOUS_CARR_WA_ARPU,\n BUCKET_NAME,\n BUCKET_VALUE,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\n where OPPORTUNITY_ID = '0067S000007xOLRQA2'\n and PRODUCT_CODE = 'PAY0001'\norder by WA_ARR_ARPU desc" }, { "key": "BT-9364", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Set DD Risk to \"Completed\" if the related opp is \"Closed Won\" ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Unassigned", "reporter": "Menash Mizrahi", "created": "2025-12-08T17:37:54.537+0200", "updated": "2025-12-08T18:10:10.690+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/8/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "Please see the following example where the DD risk should have been marked as completed because the related opportunity was set to closed won. This did not occur due to a recent change in the label from DD risk to module risk, which disrupted the flow. Please update the label to module risk: https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Churn_Request__c/a2UVg000000cFkQMAU/view" }, { "key": "BT-9362", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Notice is blocking the search bar", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-08T17:06:04.553+0200", "updated": "2025-12-14T11:41:45.509+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/14/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "Email address:batel.zamir@hibob.ioPriority Level:Low (minor issue, not affecting operations)Request Type:Technical IssueWhich area is your request related to?:OtherPR number/Vendor name/PO number:N/ADescribe Your Request:There is a bug with the support message.It's preventing us from seeing the searched item———————————————This task was submitted through Zip Support https://form.asana.com/?k=Zoh9UFaD-TSKjjc6jWpSWQ&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9357", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - number of ee calc clarufucation", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-08T15:04:38.917+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T09:16:08.935+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "please notice the following clarificatio in calcuation of number of ee calc:\n\nwhere there are multiple records, and some have renewal_line_type <> 'Downsell' then the relevant for calculation are the records with renewal_line_type <> 'Downsell' \nwhen all the records have renewal_line_type = 'Downsell' relevany for calcuation also records with renewal_line_type = 'Downsell'this logic is relevant for ACTIVE_EE_NEWQUANTITY_MONTH_EENUMBER_OF_EE_CALC (QUANTITY_MONTH_EE / sum(opportunity_product_duration) per opportunity_id, Product and usage_ind_warr)" }, { "key": "BT-9354", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - PO 1639 is closed, but ZIP still displays it as open in the invoice inbox", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-08T14:37:23.240+0200", "updated": "2025-12-10T16:16:28.943+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/10/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "Email address:nina.ryazanov@hibob.ioIssue Summary:PO 1639 is closed, but ZIP still displays it as open in the invoice inboxYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:Procure to PayBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:ZIPDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:1. PO 1639 appears close in the system.https://hibob.ziphq.com/request/0687946c-f143-7b8b-8000-2a7c1d874d33/overview2. Open the invoice inbox in ZIP.https://hibob.ziphq.com/invoice-detail/0da42735-44d9-8900-8760-0084898c9b67Observe that PO 1639 still appears as an open PO.Expected Behavior:Closed POs should not show up as open options in the invoice inbox.Actual Behavior:PO 1639 continues to appear as open causing confusion Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.ziphq.com/request/0687946c-f143-7b8b-8000-2a7c1d874d33/overview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9353", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - wa arr fact - wrong arpu calculation", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-08T14:34:45.278+0200", "updated": "2025-12-08T14:41:35.344+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/8/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "WA_ARR_ARPU calculation is TCV_PRODUCT/QUANTITY_MONTH_EEsee example of wrong calculation" }, { "key": "BT-9352", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact wa arr - wrong value in opportunity duration", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-08T14:21:42.063+0200", "updated": "2025-12-11T12:50:20.715+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/11/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "please follow stt instruction to calculate opportunity duration ( same principles of duration calc in opportunity line)please notice that opp that the end date day is one day before start date day is full month ( + specieal logic for end of month)example to wrong calculationselect *\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WA_ARR\nwhere OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006Vg00000CVDIMI start date 2025-12-01 end date 2026-11-30 are full 12 month , on warr appears as 11.94" }, { "key": "BT-9350", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - missing population in fact wa arr", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shalev Cohen", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-08T13:29:45.670+0200", "updated": "2025-12-18T11:41:29.853+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/18/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "missing opps in waarrexpect to have all ops that were closed ( close won / closed date ) from 2023 includednot temp downsellclose opps or open opps for customer that are not churnsource bob and mosaic" }, { "key": "BT-9346", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Can't see Mosaic Status field on the account page", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-08T12:08:13.668+0200", "updated": "2025-12-08T16:44:35.397+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/8/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "Email address:einat.pick@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Can't see Mosaic Status field on the account pageYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Revenue FinOpsFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:YesSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Go to this report:https://hibob--uat.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00OVg00000DkWtUMAV/viewOpen one of accounts under Mosaic Only Customer section.Expected Behavior:The Mosaic Status field is on the layout.Actual Behavior:The Mosaic Status field is NOT on the layout.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob--uat.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00OVg00000DkWtUMAV/view———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9340", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Case Number - 00369532 - Merge duplicate accounts", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ruth Getahon", "reporter": "Nadav Bar Haim", "created": "2025-12-08T10:53:54.230+0200", "updated": "2026-01-31T16:50:34.625+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "1/31/2026", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "Was looking at the linked meeting, which Iann just rescheduled and noticed the checkbox wasn't checked, but I also don't have the ability to so the reps might not. Would love to be able to use that checkbox" }, { "key": "BT-9339", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Case Number - 00365081 - Meeting Rescheduled", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Nadav Bar Haim", "reporter": "Nadav Bar Haim", "created": "2025-12-08T10:49:21.903+0200", "updated": "2025-12-10T11:04:24.465+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/10/2025", "daysOpen": 132, "description": "Was looking at the linked meeting, which Iann just rescheduled and noticed the checkbox wasn't checked, but I also don't have the ability to so the reps might not. Would love to be able to use that checkbox" }, { "key": "BT-9332", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - waterfall - gaps in Comany_measures", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Limor Gersch", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-12-08T00:00:03.616+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T19:42:12.097+0200", "createdDate": "12/8/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 133, "description": "pls see the below quesry - I check in both (mrt_wtfl_company_measures_by_source_company & mrt_wtfl_company_measures)if you’ll check uat vs. prod - you’ll see that in PROD we’re getting 2 records (acquisition = exclude & include) and in uat only one record (acquisition = n/a) → for company_measures.in mrt_wtfl_company_measures_by_source_company I see the same.I’ve note that it happens moslty in cases on is_churn=TRUE, but only.wee have a lot of companies with this issue.select company_id, source_company, source_company_for_measure, acquisition_account_status, last_day_of_month, ytd_flag, \"START\", new_business, upsell, uplift, downsell, downlift, churn, natural_growth, END, nvl(TOTAL_START,0) as start_t, nvl(TOTAL_NEW_BUSINESS,0) nb_t, nvl(TOTAL_UPSELL,0) upsell_t, nvl(TOTAL_DOWNSELL,0) downsell_t, nvl(TOTAL_UPLIFT,0) uplift_t, nvl(TOTAL_DOWNLIFT,0) downlift_t, nvl(TOTAL_NATURAL_GROWTH,0) ng_t, nvl(TOTAL_FOREX,0) forex_t, nvl(TOTAL_CHURN,0) churn_t, nvl(end,0) end_t, start_t+nb_t+upsell_t+uplift_t+downsell_t+downlift_t+ng_t+forex_t+ CHURN_t as sum_total, end_t-sum_total as difffrom uat_dwh.waterfall.mrt_wtfl_company_measures_by_source_company Pwhere 1=1 and COMPANY_ID = '479176' and LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH = '2024-07-31' and PERIOD = 'ytd' and BUCKET_TYPE = 'carr_current' and year(last_day_of_month)>=2024order by P. last_day_of_month asc;and for company_measures:select company_id, lead_company, acquisition, acquisition_account_status, last_day_of_month, ytd_flag, \"START\", new_business, upsell, uplift, downsell, downlift, churn, natural_growth, END, nvl(TOTAL_START,0) as start_t, nvl(TOTAL_NEW_BUSINESS,0) nb_t, nvl(TOTAL_UPSELL,0) upsell_t, nvl(TOTAL_DOWNSELL,0) downsell_t, nvl(TOTAL_UPLIFT,0) uplift_t, nvl(TOTAL_DOWNLIFT,0) downlift_t, nvl(TOTAL_NATURAL_GROWTH,0) ng_t, nvl(TOTAL_FOREX,0) forex_t, nvl(TOTAL_CHURN,0) churn_t, nvl(end,0) end_t, start_t+nb_t+upsell_t+uplift_t+downsell_t+downlift_t+ng_t+forex_t+ CHURN_t as sum_total, end_t-sum_total as difffrom uat_dwh.waterfall.mrt_wtfl_company_measures Pwhere 1=1 and COMPANY_ID = '479176' and LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH = '2024-07-31' and PERIOD = 'ytd' and BUCKET_TYPE = 'carr_current' and year(last_day_of_month)>=2024order by P. last_day_of_month asc;we used the below query yo identify yhe gap - while is_churn=trueselect COMPANY_ID, LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH, PERIOD, REVENUE_TYPE, BUCKET_TYPE, YTD_FLAG, LTM_FLAG, ACQUISITION, lead_company, nvl(round(\"START\"),0), nvl(round(NEW_BUSINESS),0), nvl(round(UPSELL),0), nvl(round(UPLIFT),0), nvl(round(DOWNSELL),0), nvl(round(DOWNLIFT),0), nvl(round(NATURAL_GROWTH),0), nvl(round(END),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_NEW_BUSINESS),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_START),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_CHURN),0), nvl(round( TOTAL_UPSELL),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_UPLIFT),0), nvl(round( TOTAL_DOWNLIFT),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_FOREX),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_NATURAL_GROWTH),0), nvl (NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,0), --BOP_NEW_BUSINESS_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES, --BOP_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES, nvl(round(NDR_NUMERATOR_FOREX),0), nvl(round(GDR_NUMERATOR_FOREX),0)from PROD_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_COMPANY_MEASURESwhere 1=1 and LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH < '2025-11-01' and cOMPANY_ID not IN ( select COMPANY_ID from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_MONTHLY where MODEL_TYPE = 'actual' group by COMPANY_ID having max(case when SOURCE ilike '%mosaic%' then 1 else 0 end) = 1) and cOMPANY_ID IN ( select COMPANY_ID from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_MONTHLY where MODEL_TYPE = 'actual' and LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH ilike '%2024%' and is_churn=TRUE) minusselect COMPANY_ID, LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH, PERIOD, REVENUE_TYPE, BUCKET_TYPE, YTD_FLAG, LTM_FLAG, ACQUISITION, lead_company, nvl(round(\"START\"),0), nvl(round(NEW_BUSINESS),0), nvl(round(UPSELL),0), nvl(round(UPLIFT),0), nvl(round(DOWNSELL),0), nvl(round(DOWNLIFT),0), nvl(round(NATURAL_GROWTH),0), nvl(round(END),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_NEW_BUSINESS),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_START),0),------- nvl(round(TOTAL_CHURN),0), nvl(round( TOTAL_UPSELL),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_UPLIFT),0), nvl(round( TOTAL_DOWNLIFT),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_FOREX),0), nvl(round(TOTAL_NATURAL_GROWTH),0), nvl (NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,0),------- --BOP_NEW_BUSINESS_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES, -- BOP_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES, nvl(round(NDR_NUMERATOR_FOREX),0), nvl(round(GDR_NUMERATOR_FOREX),0)from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_COMPANY_MEASURESwhere 1=1 and LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH < '2025-11-01' and COMPANY_ID not IN ( select COMPANY_ID from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_MONTHLY where MODEL_TYPE = 'actual' group by COMPANY_ID having max(case when SOURCE ilike '%mosaic%' then 1 else 0 end) = 1) and cOMPANY_ID IN ( select COMPANY_ID from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_MONTHLY where MODEL_TYPE = 'actual' and LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH ilike '%2024%' and is_churn=TRUE)order by LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH desc, company_id" }, { "key": "BT-9317", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Upsell sub verification fails (without amendment", "status": "On Hold", is not on bill date (causing a split to upsell 1 and 2sync the contract to NSCheck the result of the sub verficationExpected Behavior:it should passActual Behavior:it fails, and the failure doesn't "2026-02-23T10:33:35.782+0200", "createdDate": "12/6/2025", "updatedDate": "2/23/2026", "daysOpen": 134, "description": "is new business ( waterfall bucket and on )need to be set as true even is new business is 0its impact logos reconciliationexample COMPANY_ID = '001Vg00000QYLZOIA5'" }, { "key": "BT-9250", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - company measure - NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES need to be calculate based on the employees of the prev month pf the same key", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Stanislav Livshyn", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-04T23:56:33.992+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T19:31:00.272+0200", "createdDate": "12/4/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 136, "description": "on top of the current logic of NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES - based on acquisition status and source complayonce number if EE is calculated on the record it need to compare to the number of employee previous record from the same key (company, revenue_type, period, bucket_type , source company)for example \nselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH,\n BUCKET_TYPE,\n PERIOD,\n LEAD_COMPANY,\n\n\n\n SOURCE_COMPANY,\n SOURCE_COMPANY_FOR_MEASURE,\n -- NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n BOP_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n -- NEW_BUSINESS_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n -- CHURN_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n\n\n \"START\",\n NEW_BUSINESS,\n UPSELL,\n -- UPLIFT,\n DOWNSELL,\n -- DOWNLIFT,\n -- NATURAL_GROWTH,\n -- FOREX,\n CHURN,\n END,\nTOTAL_START,\n--TOTAL_DOWNLIFT,\nTOTAL_CHURN,\n TOTAL_UPSELL,\n TOTAL_DOWNSELL\n -- GDR_NUMERATOR_NO_FOREX,\n -- YTD_FLAG\n\n\n\n\n\n from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_COMPANY_MEASURES_BY_SOURCE_COMPANY c\nwhere COMPANY_ID = '641392'\n and c.BUCKET_TYPE = 'carr_current'\n and c.PERIOD = 'ytd'\n\n\nand LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH >= '2024-10-31'\n--and LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH like '2025-%'\norder by SOURCE_COMPANY,\n LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH\n\non Dec 25 record with source hibob was first added , the NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES is 44, but need to be 45, since bob didnt have any employee prev month , and we dont need to compare to mosaic MSC001and BOP OF 31/3/25 was supposd to be 1 , non mutual <> HiBobI expect to see for 'SOURCE_COMPANY_FOR_MEASURE = HIB001 for LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH =2025-12-31BOP_NEW_BUSINESS_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES = 0, NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES=45 you can see several cases:641392640773639705639928639539639867640484" }, { "key": "BT-9246", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - missing value - PROD_DWH.INT.INT_UNION_READINESS_PREP_POP for mosaic", "status": Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9210", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Prepaid Amortization Mercer", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-03T19:43:48.362+0200", "updated": "2025-12-15T09:35:24.885+0200", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "12/15/2025", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "Email address:lilia.levin@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Prepaid Amortization MercerYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:Month end closeBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:To search a bug that create incorrect prepaid amortization Expected Behavior:To Rerun prepaid for Mercer and reconciled Actual Behavior:The numbers are incorect in NS, due to prepaid amortization didnt complete all the process of amortization Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/reporting/reportrunner.nl?cr=-206&finandim,finanbuckets,srawfullname,x,x,IN,x,x=Current+Assets%01Other+Current+Asset&finandim,finanbuckets,srawvalidname,x,x,IN,x,x=145100+-+DEFERRED+EXPENSES+-+PARTNERS%01145055+-+Deferred+Expenses+-+Mercer&rangeop=EQUAL&fromreport=-202&summaryurl=%2Fapp%2Freporting%2Freportrunner.nl%3Fcr%3D-202%26whence%3D%26siaT%3D1764783148734%26siaWhc%3D%252Fapp%252Freporting%252Freportrunner.nl%26siaNv%3Dct2&isDrilldown=T&reload=T———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9208", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Unable to Clone the contract due to unhandled fault error", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-03T18:55:57.672+0200", "updated": "2025-12-04T14:10:48.175+0200", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "12/4/2025", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "Email address:emma.pearse@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Unable to Clone the contract due to unhandled fault errorYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:LowRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Not sureExpected Behavior:Should be able to Clone a contract for next billing dateActual Behavior:Unable to clone due to an unhandled fault Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/8007S000000cfnoQAA/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F0011v00001nl3OsAAI%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9207", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - mosaic company measure , buckets (uudd ) for mosaic product are written on hibob records , need to check all the buckets ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Limor Gersch", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-03T17:32:15.257+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T19:41:22.360+0200", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "for mosaic customers.(mutual / non mutual) that was added as part of the acquisiton , the upsell, downsell , uplift, downlift for mosaic product need to be added on MRT_WTFL_COMPANY_MEASURES_BY_SOURCE_COMPANY as SOURCE_COMPANY = 'MSC001'we have case it is written on hibobexamplethe upsell on june for mosaic product - Analytics_FY24Q1 was writen on hibob \nselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH,\n BOP_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n NEW_BUSINESS_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n CHURN_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n SOURCE_COMPANY,\n \"START\",\n END,\n UPSELL,\n TOTAL_UPSELL,\n DOWNSELL,\n CHURN\n\n\n\n\n\n from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_COMPANY_MEASURES_BY_SOURCE_COMPANY c\nwhere COMPANY_ID = '630182'\n and c.BUCKET_TYPE = 'carr_current'\n and c.PERIOD = 'ytd'\n--and ACQUISITION = 'n/a'\nand year(c.LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH )=2025\norder by LAST_DAY_OF_MONTHI think one of the issues is that no records were created on company measure for source mosaic p after the downsell of all products / churn , records need to be created till end of first period as appears in dim acqYTD_LAST_PERIOD for ytdLTM_LAST_PERIOD for ltmI see also cases when mosaic still exists and the upsell is added to HiBob recordsselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n SOURCE,\n \"START\",\n LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH,\n REVENUE_TYPE,\n \"START\",\n CHURN,\n END,\n NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n PREVIOUS_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n IS_DUMMY_CORE,\n CHURN_EFFECTIVE_DATE\n\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_MONTHLY\nwhere MODEL_TYPE = 'actual'\nand COMPANY_ID = '0011v000038xvZJAAY'\n--and PRODUCT_CODE = 'COR0001'\nAND LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH like '2025-12%'the upsell of 3250 was added to hibobselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH,\n SOURCE_COMPANY,\n\n\n\n \"START\",\n NEW_BUSINESS,\n UPSELL,\n UPLIFT,\n DOWNSELL,\n DOWNLIFT,\n NATURAL_GROWTH,\n FOREX,\n CHURN,\n END,\n\n TOTAL_UPSELL,\n TOTAL_DOWNSELL\n\n\n\n\n from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_COMPANY_MEASURES_BY_SOURCE_COMPANY c\nwhere COMPANY_ID = '0011v000038xvZJAAY'\n and c.BUCKET_TYPE = 'arr_current'\n and c.PERIOD = 'ytd'\n--and ACQUISITION = 'n/a'\nand year(c.LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH )=2025\nand LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH = '2025-12-31'\norder by LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH desc" }, { "key": "BT-9206", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Bug fix add is deleted to the updated queries in CIQ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Matan Shachaf", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-03T17:02:07.630+0200", "updated": "2025-12-04T12:43:54.754+0200", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "12/4/2025", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "Email address:aviram.nasimi@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Bug fixYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:CommissionsFinance Area:CommissionsBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:CaptivateIQDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:QuerySteps to Reproduce:The upsell does not appear in the query.Expected Behavior:The query should include and pull all upsells.Actual Behavior:The query is not pulling the upsells.Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9201", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - mosaic - company 32575 (pento + mosaic , not hibob) not working as expected - to be taken with Limor", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Low", "assignee": "Limor Gersch", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-03T15:31:01.592+0200", "updated": "2026-02-24T19:12:22.072+0200", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "2/24/2026", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "The monthly and company measures are not working as expected , ee, churn , upsell" }, { "key": "BT-9200", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Can't close won amendment opp", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-03T15:21:56.868+0200", "updated": "2025-12-03T16:39:18.806+0200", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "12/3/2025", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "Email address:sima.kovarsky@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Can't close won amendment oppYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Can't close won an amendment opp, I'm getting an error. I need to downsell a module (UK Payroll) + implementation. I created manually the implementation downsell linesExpected Behavior:Close won the amendment oppActual Behavior:Getting error:An unhandled fault has occurred in this flowAn unhandled fault has occurred while processing the flow. Please contact your system administrator for more information.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006Vg00000PQxNqIAL/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FReport%2F00OVg00000Bwou9MAB%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9197", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - UK Payroll - Implementation line created from Upsell opp is not linked to existing Payroll Customer", "status": "Not Started", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Shahar Reich", "created": "2025-12-03T15:03:09.685+0200", "updated": "2026-01-22T13:01:03.176+0200", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "1/22/2026", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "When Deal Desk creates an Upsell Opportunity for the UK Payroll Implementation product, the implementation contract line that is added to the contract is not being linked to the existing Payroll Customer record. This results in implementation lines being created without a Payroll Customer association. \nI’m attaching an example from UAT:\nhttps://hibob--uat.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Payroll_Customer__c/a4cVe000000oeOrIAI/view\nhttps://hibob--uat.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract_Line__c/a2YVe000001B0fFMAS/view" }, { "key": "BT-9196", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - mosaic wrong number in natural_growth number of employees ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Stanislav Livshyn", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-03T14:52:11.446+0200", "updated": "2025-12-10T09:35:46.145+0200", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "12/10/2025", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "The number of employee in mosaic needs to be 1 ( sometimes is 2,3) due to data issue but natural growth not expected to be more then that there are cases of high numbers in NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES in MRT_WTFL_COMPANY_MEASURES_BY_SOURCE_COMPANY select LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH, COMPANY_ID, NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES, NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES, NEW_BUSINESS_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES, CHURN_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES\n from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_COMPANY_MEASURES_BY_SOURCE_COMPANY\nwhere SOURCE_COMPANY = 'MSC001'\nand NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES >1I check customer 640773 : company measure and monthly the results of the company measure are not aligned with the monthly \nselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH,\n BOP_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n NATURAL_GROWTH_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n NEW_BUSINESS_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n CHURN_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n SOURCE_COMPANY,\n \"START\",\n END,\n DOWNSELL,\n CHURN\n\n\n\n\n\n from uat_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_COMPANY_MEASURES_BY_SOURCE_COMPANY c\nwhere COMPANY_ID = '640773'\n and c.BUCKET_TYPE = 'carr_current'\n and c.PERIOD = 'ytd'\n--and ACQUISITION = 'n/a'\nand year(c.LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH )=2025\norder by LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH" }, { "key": "BT-9192", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - change lseg node in zip", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-03T14:19:56.273+0200", "updated": "2025-12-15T11:28:36.744+0200", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "12/15/2025", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "Email address:natali.elias@hibob.ioIssue Summary:change lseg node in zipYour Department:LegalBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:NoSystems Involved:ZIPDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Screening toolSteps to Reproduce:we need to change the \"legal name\" the node pull from the Vendor portal instead of NS and also make sure this step is a mandatory step in the vendor portal, thanks!Expected Behavior:we need to change the \"legal name\" the node pull from the Vendor portal instead of NS and also make sure this step is a mandatory step in the vendor portal, thanks!Actual Behavior:it pulls from NSIs there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9188", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - mosaic - downsell arr is diffrent than prev arr (may be rounding issue ) cause end bucket <> 0", "status": "Not Started", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Limor Gersch", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-12-03T11:49:53.367+0200", "updated": "2026-03-29T18:01:22.605+0300", "createdDate": "12/3/2025", "updatedDate": "3/29/2026", "daysOpen": 137, "description": "we have cases were the downsell amount is not fully alignd with non downsell amount which cause negative arrselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n DATE_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_ARPU,\n REVENUE_TYPE,\n RENEWAL_LINE_TYPE,\n PREVIOUS_WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_ARPU,\n WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_ARPU,\n \"START\",\n DOWNSELL,\n end,\n ROUNDING_IND\n\n\n\n\nfrom UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_WATERFALL_BUCKETS\n where COMPANY_ID = '629918'\nand PRODUCT_CODE ='Premium_Connection_Snowflake_FY23Q1'\n -- and OPPORTUNITY_ID = '006UH00000WPFxWYAX'\n and REVENUE_TYPE = 'arr'\n and DATE_ID like '%2025-06-%'\n\n order by DATE_IDselect distinct COMPANY_ID\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_MONTHLY\nwhere end < 0\n or ( DOWNSELL is not null and end <> 0 )\nand SOURCE = 'mosaic'" }, { "key": "BT-9179", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - 32729 24Slides", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shelly Mor", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-02T22:28:21.540+0200", "updated": "2025-12-10T11:28:14.010+0200", "createdDate": "12/2/2025", "updatedDate": "12/10/2025", "daysOpen": 138, "description": "Email address:sivan.mor@hibob.ioIssue Summary:32729 24Slides Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Revenue FinOpsFinance Area:RevenuesBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:32729 24Slides - Revenue November 2025Steps to Reproduce:The Customer received an amendment to reduce the minimum EE, which created a negative revenue amount of $59,817 after the amendment.This negative revenue appears to eliminate all previously recognized revenue for this Customer's contract.Example of a revenue component that eliminates revenue recognized in September and October 2023 https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/accounting/revrec/revenueplan.nl?ispopup=T&id=1517869&ifrmcntnr=TExpected Behavior:The amendment should apply going forward only, without reversing any revenue that was previously recognized.Actual Behavior:All revenue associated with this customer has been canceled.Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9177", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Mosaic - Cash Sale", "status": "Rejected", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Shelly Mor", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-02T22:17:21.920+0200", "updated": "2026-01-22T13:01:03.060+0200", "createdDate": "12/2/2025", "updatedDate": "1/22/2026", "daysOpen": 138, "description": "Email address:sivan.mor@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Mosaic - Cash Sale Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Revenue FinOpsFinance Area:RevenuesBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Mosaic customersSteps to Reproduce:Mosaic customers were synced to NetSuite in a way that did not account for the free months in the contract term. For example, if the contract is for 12 months with 2 free months, the contract term that was sent to NetSuite is 10 months instead of 12.Expected Behavior:The contract term should include the free months.Actual Behavior:Mosaic customers were synced to NetSuite in a way that did not account for the free months in the contract term. customers for example- 30216 Carbyne Ltd, 94403 GoNoodleIs there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies -
