There is no quote in quote section on SFDCCan't move Opp is Closed WonIs there an available workaround?:YesPlease describe the workaround (steps):Duplicate quote and close opp on different Dealhub Quote ID Please provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Case/500Vg00000Y9OHFIA3/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FReport%2F00O7S000001k62L%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9102", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Ringlead is not assigning a rep to Direct partner leads", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Yuval Matus", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-01T15:26:01.985+0200", "updated": "2025-12-02T10:37:57.060+0200", "createdDate": "12/1/2025", "updatedDate": "12/2/2025", "daysOpen": 139, "description": "Email address:einat.gutlohn@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Ringlead is not assigning a rep to Direct partner leadsYour Department:PartnersBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:RingleadDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Partner Lead SubmissionSteps to Reproduce:Not sure what the steps are, but in general, it happens for some submitted leads from PSExpected Behavior:The lead will automatically be assigned to a rep once the account is attributed to the partnerActual Behavior:The account is UnassignedIs there an available workaround?:YesPlease describe the workaround (steps):Manually assignPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00OVg00000JsGjCMAV/view———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9098", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Agent Service Bugs", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Gur Zamir", "reporter": "Gal Daich", "created": "2025-12-01T14:35:31.131+0200", "updated": "2026-03-25T14:36:31.725+0200", "createdDate": "12/1/2025", "updatedDate": "3/25/2026", "daysOpen": 139, "description": "Bug: Missing Agent Records & Incorrect Error Mapping in ICP OrchestratorSession UUID: 88607fd5-51a3-4cdb-a92e-5b07a8f35e0eRelated Job: https://app.workato.com/recipes/63347553/job/j-AXCrM8od-wLfADpSummaryA job failed with a 400 error code due to a Website Scraping Agent failure. Investigation shows missing agent records, incorrect agent-to-status mapping, and an incorrect error message returned by the GAI service logs.Issues Identified1. Missing Agents in agent_status.jsonThe agent_status.json file for the session is missing two expected agents:Tech StackGoogle PageSpeedThese should appear for every modern ICP run but are absent for this session.2. Missing Records in TBL_ORCHESTRATION_AGENT_LOGSThe table PROD_INTEGRATION.ADMINISTRATION.TBL_ORCHESTRATION_AGENT_LOGS contains 13 records for the provided session UUID.However, the Tech Stack agent record is missing, even though it should be logged like the others.3. Incorrect Mapping of Failed AgentIn TBL_ORCHESTRATION_AGENT_LOGS, the failed agent “Website Scraping” is incorrectly mapped to the value \"Unknown\" instead of the correct agent name.4. Incorrect Error Message in GAI_AGENT_SERVICE_RUN_LOGSThe table PROD_INTEGRATION.ADMINISTRATION.GAI_AGENT_SERVICE_RUN_LOGS (expected to show only the orchestrator-level agent execution) does not display the actual error.Instead of the expected message, it shows:\"too many values to unpack (expected 2)\"Expected error message:Website Scraping Agent failed with error:\nMandatory tool Get Website Content failure:\n{'message': \"HTTPSConnectionPool(host='recrutement-expertimo.fr', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=10)\"}\nwith status code: 400\nExpected BehaviorAll agents (including Tech Stack and Google PageSpeed) should appear in agent_status.json.TBL_ORCHESTRATION_AGENT_LOGS should contain records for all agents and correctly map failed agents to their proper names.GAI_AGENT_SERVICE_RUN_LOGS should return the full underlying error instead of a Python unpacking error.ImpactDebugging becomes significantly harder due to missing and incorrect metadata.Monitoring and alerting systems relying on proper agent logs may misfire or miss failures.Some agents may not be executed or tracked correctly during ICP runs." }, { "key": "BT-9084", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Can't do C&T to a contract", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-01T12:49:41.833+0200", "updated": "2025-12-01T13:43:36.338+0200", "createdDate": "12/1/2025", "updatedDate": "12/1/2025", "daysOpen": 139, "description": "Email address:sima.kovarsky@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Can't do C&T to a contractYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:I'm trying to do C&T to a contract (I already did one yesterday but need to do it again to fix something) and I'm receiving an error: \"An unhandled fault has occurred in this flowAn unhandled fault has occurred while processing the flow. Please contact your system administrator for more information.\"Expected Behavior:Be able to C&TActual Behavior:receiving an errorIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800Vg00000Y5ppeIAB/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F0017S00000IEDDrQAP%2Fview———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9065", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - PS revenue recognition", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-12-01T07:13:49.705+0200", "updated": "2025-12-16T10:29:03.309+0200", "createdDate": "12/1/2025", "updatedDate": "12/16/2025", "daysOpen": 140, "description": "Email address:sivan.mor@hibob.ioIssue Summary:PS revenue recognitionYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Revenue FinOpsFinance Area:RevenuesBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:No revenue was recorded for the PS.Steps to Reproduce:noExpected Behavior:Revenue will be recorded for projects approved in SF by the finance team.Actual Behavior:No revenue was recorded for PS.Is there an available workaround?:YesPlease describe the workaround (steps):Revenue will be recorded for projects approved in SF by the finance team.———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9063", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - ZIP is creating invoices in USD instead of ILS for vendors whose default currency is ILS", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-30T17:25:05.719+0200", "updated": "2026-02-10T11:59:01.826+0200", "createdDate": "11/30/2025", "updatedDate": "2/10/2026", "daysOpen": 140, "description": "Email address:nina.ryazanov@hibob.ioIssue Summary:ZIP is creating invoices in USD instead of ILS for vendors whose default currency is ILSYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:Procure to PayBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:ZIPDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:1. Receive an invoice for a vendor whose default currency is ILS.2. Observe that ZIP assigns the invoice currency as USD.3. ZIP automatically applies a PO in USD currency, though both the vendor and PO are opened in ILS.Expected Behavior:Invoice and any linked PO should default to the vendor’s currency (ILS)Actual Behavior:Invoice currency is set to USD, and attached PO is auto-applied incorrectly. Examples:https://hibob.ziphq.com/invoice-detail/0dd119b5-2ff8-8a00-8760-00848bcd54abhttps://hibob.ziphq.com/invoice-detail/0dd7cd09-b3d5-8580-8760-0084893e81b1Is there an available workaround?:YesPlease describe the workaround (steps):You must manually unapply each auto-applied PO, re-select the vendor, and choose the correct currency and re-apply same PO.For invoices without POs, you must manually change the invoice currency to ILS. Please provide any relevant links:https://hibob.ziphq.com/invoice-detail/0dd7cd09-b3d5-8580-8760-0084893e81b1———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9056", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - US payrol - Upsell - bug in validation", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Ofek Mordo", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-30T15:10:05.086+0200", "updated": "2025-12-15T12:15:16.908+0200", "createdDate": "11/30/2025", "updatedDate": "12/15/2025", "daysOpen": 140, "description": "Email address:elad.stauberg@hibob.ioIssue Summary:US payrool - (Time & Attendance Essential)Is there an available workaround?:YesPlease describe the workaround (steps):Create the implementation manuallyPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800Vg00000GAu9PIAT/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001Vg00000ED1mFIAT%2Fview ; https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/cmp/force__dynamicRelatedListViewAll?force__flexipageId=Contract_Lightning_Page&force__cmpId=lst_dynamicRelatedList&force__recordId=800Vg00000GAu9PIAT&ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001Vg00000ED1mFIAT%2Fview&uid=1764495226505———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9045", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - PS finance approval", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Racheli Levi Leshem", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-30T11:07:26.139+0200", "updated": "2025-12-01T12:31:36.860+0200", "createdDate": "11/30/2025", "updatedDate": "12/1/2025", "daysOpen": 140, "description": "Email address:sivan.mor@hibob.ioIssue Summary:PS finance approvalYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Revenue FinOpsFinance Area:RevenuesBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:YesSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Approval PS projectsSteps to Reproduce:Projects approved by the PS team and awaiting approval from the finance team. Despite trying to approve the projects individually, they still appear in Pending Finance Approval.Expected Behavior:The projects will move to an approved status and will no longer appear in Pending Approval.Actual Behavior:Some of the projects are not being approved, despite my attempts to do so.Is there an available workaround?:YesPlease describe the workaround (steps):The projects will be approved.Please provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/o/OnBoarding__c/list?filterName=Pending_Finance_Approval_High_Risk_all———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9043", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Periods dates are not correct", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Idan Brand", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-30T10:07:53.501+0200", "updated": "2025-11-30T14:01:04.458+0200", "createdDate": "11/30/2025", "updatedDate": "11/30/2025", "daysOpen": 141, "description": "Email address:sima.kovarsky@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Periods dates are not correctYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:DealDeskFinance Area:DealDesk/CPQBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Hard-commit renewal contract. The customer’s billing date is December 31st. The contract is built from 4 periods, which causes the end date to fall on the 31st instead of the 30thExpected Behavior:Period 4 end date should be 30.12.27Actual Behavior:Period 4 end date is 31.12.27Is there an available workaround?:YesPlease describe the workaround (steps):Providing additional conditions wording and creating all the periods manually - not preferredPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob--dealhub.vf.force.com/apex/DealHub?param=Quotes&OpportunityId=0067S00000Dk5REQAZ&isdtp=mn———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Mosaic legacy - Fact Mosaic_Legacy_POP_Readiness - update opportunity_product_first_date", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Low", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-11-27T22:42:02.841+0200", "updated": "2026-01-05T14:55:58.942+0200", "createdDate": "11/27/2025", "updatedDate": "1/5/2026", "daysOpen": 143, "description": "update logic of ‘opportunity_product_first_date’:instead of (in the code today): first_value(olm.start_date_c change to first_value(greatest (OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,ACQ.ACQUISITION_DATE)for example - for opportunity_id='006UH00000G0MlkYAF'OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_FIRST_DATE should be = 2025-03-31" }, { "key": "BT-9028", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - FACT_WATERFALL_BUCKETS - missing 'CORE_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES'", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Limor Gersch", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-11-27T15:35:18.403+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T19:40:24.621+0200", "createdDate": "11/27/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 143, "description": "in cases where the product_code is not ‘COR0001’ and source is not ‘mosaic’ seems like we don’t have ‘CORE_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES’ value.we need to spread the CORE_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES to all other products of the Company_ID - except from cases where the SOURCE='mosaic'see below:select distinct\n company_id,\n --date_id,\n SOURCE,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n CORE_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES\n\n from uat_dwh.waterfall.FACT_WATERFALL_BUCKETS\n where 1=1\n --and segment is null\n -- and model_type='actual'\n -- and revenue_type='carr'\n --and year(last_day_of_month)>= '2025'\n and company_id='48506'\nand source in ('mosaic','hibob')\nand year(DATE_ID) >'2025'I expect to see CORE_NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES=135 for the below product_codes as well:UKP0001SAN001TPA001" }, { "key": "BT-9008", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - fact_opportunity_line_mosaic - wrong 'Renewal_line_type'", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Limor Gersch", "reporter": "Limor Gersch", "created": "2025-11-27T09:54:43.017+0200", "updated": "2025-11-27T13:56:36.903+0200", "createdDate": "11/27/2025", "updatedDate": "11/27/2025", "daysOpen": 144, "description": "pls check:select distinct opportunity_id, total_price, total_price_finance_only_c, renewal_line_typefrom uat_dwh.shared.fact_opportunity_line_mosaicwhere opportunity_id='006UH00000WPb3ZYAT'per the STT - I expect to see ‘renewal_line_type’=downsell for every record that its total_price_finance_only_c<0in addition - since you already touch this model - we need to add logic to this field (renewal_line_type):Need to check if there's a value in Fact_Opportunity_Line_Mosaic.renewal_line_type and bring it elseNeed to check 'OPPORTUNITY_NAME' field - when ilike (Downsell) - then mark as downsell** marked in Blue in the STT:" }, { "key": "BT-9004", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Ongoing Request- Update Date in Order Form", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Guy Levin", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-26T18:11:27.641+0200", "updated": "2025-11-27T10:44:37.527+0200", "createdDate": "11/26/2025", "updatedDate": "11/27/2025", "daysOpen": 144, "description": "Email address:martin.briones@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Ongoing Request- Update Date in Order FormYour Department:FP&ABusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:NoSystems Involved:DealhubDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:YesPlease specify the project \\ process:Ido's Assisting Steps to Reproduce:When generating the contract, the date in the order form in the attached section is showing the incorrect date Expected Behavior:Should show the correct date it was executed Actual Behavior:Not the correct date Is there an available workaround?:YesPlease describe the workaround (steps):Ido has the steps. Please provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/0D5Vg00000euJCq/view———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-9000", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - CW Time Stamp is Missing in Auto Renewals", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Racheli Levi Leshem", "reporter": "Idan Brand", "created": "2025-11-26T14:57:18.187+0200", "updated": "2025-11-26T17:21:37.526+0200", "createdDate": "11/26/2025", "updatedDate": "11/26/2025", "daysOpen": 144, "description": "Almost 80 auto renewals are missing the CW time stamp. The reason is the the opp fields assignment was changed to work on before action, and since the auto renewal closes with autolaunch flow which is triggered by workato field update, salesforce consider the closer as the same transaction and not triggering the before flow.\n\nSolution: move the CW fields assignment to the auto renewal closure autolaunch flow.QA was done in this Opp:" }, { "key": "BT-8994", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Billing contact removed in SF still receives invoices in NS after renewal (sync issue between SF and NS)", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-26T13:44:46.849+0200", "updated": "2025-12-02T17:45:05.646+0200", "createdDate": "11/26/2025", "updatedDate": "12/2/2025", "daysOpen": 144, "description": "Email address:noam.muskat@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Billing contact removed in SF still receives invoices in NS after renewal (sync issue between SF and NS)Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Billing & CollectionFinance Area:BillingBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:1. Go through a customer renewal flow in SF2. In the renewal contract, set a new billing contact that is different from the existing primary billing contact in NS3. SF automatically marks the old billing contact as “remove from NS\"4. In NS, open the customer record and observe:The old primary contact appears as a separate line without a roleThe new billing contact appears correctly as the primary one4. Check the customer’s Communication tab in NSExpected Behavior:Only the new billing contact defined in the SF renewal should receive invoices.The old billing contact marked in SF as “remove from NS” should no longer appear in NS or receive any invoice communications.The updated contact information should sync before the invoice is sent after the renewal.Actual Behavior:Although SF marks the old billing contact as “remove from NS,” NS still sends invoices to both:the new billing contact (correct)the old billing contact (incorrect), which still appears in NS without a role.This happens even though the update was completed prior to the invoice being issued.Examples:1. https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/common/entity/custjob.nl?id=4962342. https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/common/entity/custjob.nl?id=139093. https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/common/entity/custjob.nl?id=820585Is there an available workaround?:No———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-8992", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Add trigger 'On Edit' for Zab sub integration from NS to Mosaic SFDC", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ilay Reshef", "reporter": "Ilay Reshef", "created": "2025-11-26T13:14:26.180+0200", "updated": "2025-11-26T14:10:09.639+0200", "createdDate": "11/26/2025", "updatedDate": "11/26/2025", "daysOpen": 144, "description": "In order to prevent missing transaction to be sync to Mosaic SFDC, there is need to change the WebHook trigger event to 'Create & Edit'.\nZab subscriptions is created via CSV and the current trigger state is just on Create." }, { "key": "BT-8990", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - RingLead region not triggered upon Country update", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ben Ben-David", "reporter": "Eden Mezuman", "created": "2025-11-26T12:35:28.132+0200", "updated": "2025-12-02T19:22:01.032+0200", "createdDate": "11/26/2025", "updatedDate": "12/2/2025", "daysOpen": 144, "description": "RingLead Region update did not run upon country update, for example-\nhttps://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/001Vg000009mnxNIAQ/view" }, { "key": "BT-8981", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Billing contacts did not migrate when entity changed from HiBob US to HiBob IL", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Matan Shachaf", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-24T18:12:23.634+0200", "updated": "2025-12-08T17:20:36.761+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/8/2025", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "Email address:noam.muskat@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Billing contacts did not migrate when entity changed from HiBob US to HiBob ILYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Billing & CollectionFinance Area:BillingBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:1. Open customer Stigmergy Ltd (BOB ID 640827)2. Review the entity change performed from HiBob US to HiBob IL3. Check the newly created NS profile4. Observe that neither the primary nor the secondary billing contacts were copied to the new profileExpected Behavior:When changing the customer’s entity and generating a new NS profile, all existing billing contacts (primary and secondary) should migrate automaticallyActual Behavior:The new NS profile was created without the billing contacts - both fields are empty. Address validation fails when the street name contains multiple spaces between words", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Olena Mishchenko", "created": "2025-11-24T17:01:39.184+0200", "updated": "2025-11-26T09:52:44.415+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "11/26/2025", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-8929", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Word Limit Error - Zip to LS", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-24T17:01:33.024+0200", "updated": "2025-12-15T09:59:29.268+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/15/2025", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "Request Summary:Word Limit Error - Zip to LSEmail address:natali.elias@hibob.ioPriority:HighYour Team:LegalInvolved Systems:ZIPRequest Type:Technical IssueWhich area is your request related to?:OtherPR number/Vendor name/PO number:2516Additional Details:We’re encountering another error caused by the word limitation.We need to please remove any word limit ASAP———————————————This task was submitted through BT - Ongoing Supporthttps://form.asana.com/?k=5IBQWw2cjsFsy6P3_02rYA&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-8919", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Partner Contact Role to be Added on Lost Opportunities", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ruth Getahon", "reporter": "Ben Ben-David", "created": "2025-11-24T15:04:10.034+0200", "updated": "2026-01-05T12:51:00.598+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "1/5/2026", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "This error occurred when the flow tried to create records: CANNOT_INSERT_UPDATE_ACTIVATE_ENTITY: dlrs_OpportunityContactRoleTrigger: execution of AfterInsert caused by: System.DmlException: Update failed. First exception on row 0 with id 006Vg00000JAMypIAH; first error: FIELD_CUSTOM_VALIDATION_EXCEPTION, You do not have permissions to edit Closed Lost Opportunities. Please contact a Salesforce administrator if you need edits done on this opportunity.: [] (dlrs) Trigger.dlrs_OpportunityContactRoleTrigger: line 7, column 1. You can look up ExceptionCode values in the SOAP API Developer Guide.\nPossible solution:Update the opp exclusion from validation to true and then turn it off to false. We need to check if we can add to custom permission exclution with Expires On. I.E Assign Permission Set limited in time with custom permission within + set it on the validation itself. On the following flow:https://hibob--uat.sandbox.lightning.force.com/builder_platform_interaction/flowBuilder.app?flowId=301Ve00000Q86xaIABI've added the following dmls to avoid triggering the opp validation on lost update:https://hibob--uat.sandbox.my.salesforce-setup.com/lightning/setup/ObjectManager/Opportunity/ValidationRules/03d1v00000079C0AAI/viewP" }, { "key": "BT-8910", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - [URGENT] Error with script revoking role access after 90 days of inactivity", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ilay Reshef", "reporter": "Dennis Kaluzhni", "created": "2025-11-24T14:00:37.035+0200", "updated": "2025-11-25T14:12:32.328+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "11/25/2025", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "Hi Ilay,\n\nPlease update the script to the following:\n1. Skip users from MIS CORP team (beside my own since I'm not an admin).\n2. Skip integration users (BOB MIS)\n\nAlso, as part of the regression please return the following:\n1. Roles `Strongpoint Developer Role` , `Administrator - SSO` to all MIS CORP team (for my user - exclude the Administrator SSO, I only need Strongpoint Developer Role)\n2. For BOB MIS integration user - return the roles `HB Billing Monitor` , `Adaptive Shield`" }, { "key": "BT-8909", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Unable to update primary billing contact - European Sperm Bank", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Shahar Reich", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-24T13:52:22.264+0200", "updated": "2025-11-24T15:13:52.920+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "11/24/2025", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "Email address:krishna.kandasamy@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Unable to update primary billing contact - PO appears in the ZIP inbox and is usable even though it is not fully approved", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Nir Levi", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-24T12:14:51.937+0200", "updated": "2025-12-14T16:26:32.988+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/14/2025", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "Email address:nina.ryazanov@hibob.ioIssue Summary:PO appears in the ZIP inbox and is usable even though it is not fully approvedYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Finance & Accounting Finance Area:Procure to PayBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:HighRegression:YesSystems Involved:ZIPDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:1. Observe that the PO is available and actionable.Expected Behavior:A PO that is not fully approved should not appear in the inbox and should not be usable.Actual Behavior:The PO appears in the inbox and is match and can be used despite not being fully approvedIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.ziphq.com/invoice-detail/0da515d2-bb9b-8000-8760-00848a978dc0———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-8899", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Error in Workflow app - Seminole Hard Rock Digital, LLC", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Matan Shachaf", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-24T12:03:12.933+0200", "updated": "2025-11-24T22:28:46.050+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "11/24/2025", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "Email address:krishna.kandasamy@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Error in Workflow app - Seminole Hard Rock Digital, LLCYour Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Billing & CollectionFinance Area:BillingBusiness Priority:MediumBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:Not SureSystems Involved:OtherPlease specify:Collection & AR Email AIDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:We received an email from Seminole Hard Rock Digital, LLC with 2 tasks. Email subject - DO NOT REPLY Request For Statement of Account and Open Invoices on 21 November.I rejected the first task as the customer didn't have any open invoices and approved the second task but they still got an email for the rejected task.Expected Behavior:No automated email to be send if the task is rejectedActual Behavior:Customer received an automated email for a task that was rejectedIs there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/0011v000034kqspAAA/view———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-8897", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - wrong value of carr_flag - mosaic readiness", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-11-24T11:41:15.379+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T19:39:00.567+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "wrong carr flag\nthe expected result is within the same opportunity\nonly the the latest opportunity product start should have carr_flag = true\n\nexample\n\nselect distinct\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n COMPANY_ID,\n account_id_legacy,\n account_name,\n Stage_Name,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n carr_flag,\n Opportunity_Type,\n legacy_close_won,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n CLOSE_DATE,\n CARR_first_opportunity_date,\n Following_Opportunity_ID,\n Following_Opp_carr_forecast,\n Following_Opp_arr_forecast,\n Following_Opportunity_carr_start_date,\n Following_Opportunity_arr_start_date,\n OWNER_ID,\n Opportunity_Line_ID,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n Product_Family,\n RENEWAL_LINE_TYPE,\n NET_PRICE,\n from_quantity,\n Midterm_DOWNSELL_FLAG,\n opportunity_product_first_date,\n opportunity_product_last_date,\n MOSAIC_AM_OWNER,\n months_duration,\n PRICING_PLAN\nfrom dev_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_MOSAIC_LEGACY_POP_READINESS\nwhere 1 = 1\n and COMPANY_ID ='001Vg00000QYHfOIAX'\n and product_code ='Analytics_FY24Q1'\n and MODEL_TYPE = 'actual'\nORDER BY CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,CLOSE_DATE,\n LEGACY_CLOSE_WON,\n PRODUCT_CODE, FROM_QUANTITY, OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE\nopp line id - 00kUH00000BAMCDYA5 need to be false" }, { "key": "BT-8896", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Master agreement down", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Alex Duhovny", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-24T11:30:42.668+0200", "updated": "2025-12-28T17:11:19.013+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/28/2025", "daysOpen": 146, "description": "Email address:batel.zamir@hibob.ioPriority Level:High (blocking critical procurement processes)Request Type:Technical IssueWhich area is your request related to?:AgreementPR number/Vendor name/PO number:Master agreement is not workingDescribe Your Request:The master agreement is not working ———————————————This task was submitted through Zip Support https://form.asana.com/?k=Zoh9UFaD-TSKjjc6jWpSWQ&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-8888", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - waterfall daily - segment is null ", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Raz Linkovski", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-11-24T10:17:39.024+0200", "updated": "2025-12-10T19:37:39.113+0200", "createdDate": "11/24/2025", "updatedDate": "12/10/2025", "daysOpen": 147, "description": "we have cases of no value in segment in prod\n\nwe must have segment , based on core\n\n select\n COMPANY_ID,\n DATE_ID,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES,\n NUMBER_OF_EMPLOYEES_CORE,\n SEGMENT,\n IS_DUMMY_CORE,\n MINIMUM_EMPLOYEES,\n ACTIVE_EMPLOYEES,\n GROUPING_IND\n from prod_DWH.WATERFALL.MRT_WTFL_DAILY\n where SOURCE not in ('hibob,mosaic', 'mosaic,pento', 'mosaic')\n and SEGMENT is null\n and year(DATE_ID) >= 2023\n order by COMPANY_ID" }, { "key": "BT-8827", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Autocash Bug - MIS changed a payment date with no reason.", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Daniel Starkman", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-23T12:06:53.942+0200", "updated": "2025-12-14T15:39:44.994+0200", "createdDate": "11/23/2025", "updatedDate": "12/14/2025", "daysOpen": 147, "description": "Email address:inbal.vromen@hibob.ioIssue Summary:Autocash Bug - MIS changed a payment date with no reason. Your Department:FinancePlease specify your team:Billing & CollectionFinance Area:Auto cashCollectionBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:CriticalRegression:YesSystems Involved:NetsuiteDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:Critical for bank weekly closing - Accounting reached out as a payment was received in the Bank on the 19th of Nov. It was a success match on Autocash but for some reason the logs show that MIS changed the payment date to the 20th. This is not the first time it happens - It happens at least 2 times a month. Expected Behavior:Critical for bank weekly closing - Accounting reached out as a payment was received in the Bank on the 19th of Nov. It was a success match on Autocash but for some reason the logs show that MIS changed the payment date to the 20th. This is not the first time it happens - It happens at least 2 times a month. Actual Behavior:Critical for bank weekly closing - Accounting reached out as a payment was received in the Bank on the 19th of Nov. It was a success match on Autocash but for some reason the logs show that MIS changed the payment date to the 20th. This is not the first time it happens - It happens at least 2 times a month. Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://4672400.app.netsuite.com/app/accounting/transactions/custpymt.nl?id=8885179&whence=———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-8819", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Contact Discovery Call Re-stamping Issue", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yuval Matus", "reporter": "Ben Ben-David", "created": "2025-11-23T10:22:11.651+0200", "updated": "2025-11-25T14:49:38.695+0200", "createdDate": "11/23/2025", "updatedDate": "11/25/2025", "daysOpen": 148, "description": "When Contact is getting updated https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contact/003Vg00000QkQoYIAV/related/Histories/view\n\n Solution:Looks like that we need to add a check-up on the SAL /SQL decision node on Event flow https://hibob.lightning.force.com/builder_platform_interaction/flowBuilder.app?flowId=301Vg00000nRtx7It wendit went with the middle node SAL True SQL False - i think when SQL/SAL True, we shouldn't touch the record on disco call (we should allow progressing with Account checkup)" }, { "key": "BT-8808", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Address validation fails when apostrophe is present in the city", "status": "Canceled", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Olena Mishchenko", "created": "2025-11-21T19:06:32.930+0200", "updated": "2025-11-25T10:22:33.420+0200", "createdDate": "11/21/2025", "updatedDate": "11/25/2025", "daysOpen": 149, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-8807", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - Billing Address becomes invalid when extra space is added before or after the value", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Olena Mishchenko", "created": "2025-11-21T18:15:55.364+0200", "updated": "2025-11-24T12:28:33.263+0200", "createdDate": "11/21/2025", "updatedDate": "11/24/2025", "daysOpen": 149, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-8803", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - mosaic downsell , need to appear as downsell ", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-11-21T16:54:34.619+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T19:38:42.452+0200", "createdDate": "11/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 149, "description": "mosaic downsell ( on acquisition date ) does not appear as downsell\nin order to fix it , need to add 'legacy_cose_won) to the partition of waterfall product aggregation\nsee stt - general info : \n\nin addition legacy_close_won_field need to be add to\nFACT_WATERFALL_POP\nFACT_PRODUCT_READINESS" }, { "key": "BT-8802", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - NB Opp becomes CW when Legal Additional Conditions != NULL", "status": "Rejected", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Ayala Greemberg", "reporter": "Olena Mishchenko", "created": "2025-11-21T15:50:34.716+0200", "updated": "2025-12-04T07:56:43.139+0200", "createdDate": "11/21/2025", "updatedDate": "12/4/2025", "daysOpen": 149, "description": "" }, { "key": "BT-8795", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - mosaic forecast - following not expected in case there is day gap between opp", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Low", "assignee": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-11-20T23:28:09.465+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T19:38:24.317+0200", "createdDate": "11/20/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 150, "description": "for example\nopp - 006UH00000NjfudYAB end 2025-09-13\nopp - 006UH00000TcoHdYAJ start on 2026-09-13 , not supposed to be the following\nselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n FOLLOWING_OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n FOLLOWING_OPPORTUNITY_CARR_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n CARR_FLAG,\n TOTAL_PRICE_FINANCE_ONLY_C,\n NET_PRICE,\n MIDTERM_DOWNSELL_FLAG,\n OPPORTUNITY_LINE_ID,\n ORIG_OPP_LINE_ID_FOR_REAL_DOWNSELL,\n MONTHS_DURATION\n from dev_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_MOSAIC_LEGACY_POP_READINESS\nwhere\n 1=1\n and ACCOUNT_ID ='001Vg000007IK2gIAG'\nand PRODUCT_CODE ='Premium_Connection_GSheet_Plugin'\n--and OPPORTUNITY_ID = '0062E00001RtllaQAB'\n\norder by CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP , OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE" }, { "key": "BT-8794", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - mosaic , in case of midterm downsell , the downsell net price need to be the oposite of ORIG_OPP_LINE_ID_FOR_REAL_DOWNSELL", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Limor Gersch", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-11-20T23:11:56.128+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T19:37:42.291+0200", "createdDate": "11/20/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 150, "description": "as describe in stt \n\nhttps://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Kd4tn7fi8Qzk69-oyJ6LD6qRx7enttS77AIkrS_byHo/edit?gid=513257814#gid=513257814\n\n'net price field'\n\nif Midterm_DOWNSELL_FLAG=TRUE\nset the 'NET_PRICE' for 'downsell' record as (-) of the 'NET_PRICE' per the below logic for the 'Orig_Opp_line_id_for_real_downsell'\nElse: \nNET_PRICE_calculated\n\nwe have case that is not working as expected\norig net price = 1270\ndownsell net price = -1906 , expected to be -1270 ( even if the month duration is less then 12 month , no normaluztion is requiered)\n\nselect\n COMPANY_ID,\n PRODUCT_CODE,\n OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n MODEL_TYPE,\n CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP,\n FOLLOWING_OPPORTUNITY_ID,\n FOLLOWING_OPPORTUNITY_CARR_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE,\n OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_END_DATE,\n CARR_FLAG,\n TOTAL_PRICE_FINANCE_ONLY_C,\n NET_PRICE,\n MIDTERM_DOWNSELL_FLAG,\n OPPORTUNITY_LINE_ID,\n ORIG_OPP_LINE_ID_FOR_REAL_DOWNSELL,\n MONTHS_DURATION\n from UAT_DWH.WATERFALL.FACT_MOSAIC_LEGACY_POP_READINESS\nwhere ACCOUNT_ID ='001Vg00000QYOqdIAH'\nand PRODUCT_CODE ='Analytics_FY24Q1'\nand (OPPORTUNITY_LINE_ID = '00kUH0000053mRqYAI'\nor ORIG_OPP_LINE_ID_FOR_REAL_DOWNSELL = '00kUH0000053mRqYAI')\norder by CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP , OPPORTUNITY_PRODUCT_START_DATE" }, { "key": "BT-8789", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Account that comes back from nurtre after Follow up date arrives- gets wrong MQA origin", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Nadav Bar Haim", "reporter": "Adi Yehuda Faians", "created": "2025-11-20T17:11:17.205+0200", "updated": "2025-12-14T11:11:21.348+0200", "createdDate": "11/20/2025", "updatedDate": "12/14/2025", "daysOpen": 150, "description": "In specific cases where the AE nurtured the account after CL of an opp and added a follow up date to get the account back after x days:\nWe restore the last MQA origin.\nIn this example - https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/0011v00002o3fyZAAQ/related/Histories/view\nThe original MQA origin was a \"Named Account BDR\" but the owner assigned was the AE (cause he was the opp owner).\nWhen we restore from an opp that was CL, we need to make sure that if the restored MQA origin is a \"Named Account BDR\", it should change to align with the AE/AAE role. E.g we need to swap it to a \"Named Account AE'Flow to check:Account Scheduler - Global ABX Status Change Scheduler Daily FlowCopado Package:BT-8601 Remove Partner Exclusion from 60 days process & BT-8789Tech Notes:Added 2 decision outcomes in the ‘bdr is active’ element with respective 2 Updated Records elements to update name account AE/AAE" }, { "key": "BT-8781", "project": "BT", "summary": "Internal - mosaic readiness - add new field , update following opp and carr flag", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "reporter": "Lilach Harel-Dayan", "created": "2025-11-20T16:14:30.142+0200", "updated": "2025-12-09T19:38:04.061+0200", "createdDate": "11/20/2025", "updatedDate": "12/9/2025", "daysOpen": 150, "description": "1. add new field Legacy_close_won\n2. carr flag - \nif you have few opportunities with the same CLOSE_WON_TIME_STAMP \nset as True the opportunities with the latest Legacy_close_won ( from all the opp of the same close won) rest of the opportunities ( with the same close won will be set as false ) \nopp 0064U00000pnlM2QAI - true\nopp 0064U00000pmDpMQAU false\n\n3. following opportunity id\n\nif you have several opps with the same close won time stamp, the opportunity that will be taken to the carr pizuz is the opprunity with the latest Legacy_close_won for exmple '0064U00000pmDpMQAU',\n'0064U00000pnlM2QAI' - the opp in the pizuz will be 0064U00000pnlM2QAI , this the opportunity that will have the following if existsSTT:" }, { "key": "BT-8765", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - US payroll lines without associated payroll customer", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "High", "assignee": "Yoad Shary", "reporter": "Bob MIS Integration", "created": "2025-11-20T12:26:34.118+0200", "updated": "2025-11-23T14:12:51.867+0200", "createdDate": "11/20/2025", "updatedDate": "11/23/2025", "daysOpen": 150, "description": "Email address:shahar.reich@hibob.ioIssue Summary:US payroll lines without associated payroll customerYour Department:MISBusiness Priority:HighBusiness Severity:MediumRegression:NoSystems Involved:SFDCDoes the issue relate to an ongoing project (currently in work)?:NoSteps to Reproduce:A Payroll Customer record was not created for the US Payroll product line, even though all required information exists both in the Quote and in the Opportunity Line Items.Expected Behavior:A Payroll Customer record was not created for the US Payroll product line, even though all required information exists both in the Quote and in the Opportunity Line Items.Actual Behavior:No Payroll Customer record was created for the US Payroll line, despite all relevant data being present.Is there an available workaround?:NoPlease provide any relevant links:https://hibob.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/001Vg00000WyQSUIA3/view———————————————This task was submitted through Business Technologies - Production Issuehttps://form.asana.com/?k=RKej9XVfEeD-utH9V4zY7w&d=103035621276259" }, { "key": "BT-8743", "project": "BT", "summary": "Production - Modern ICP - Website Scraping agent - Maximum input tokens reached", "status": "Deployed", "priority": "Medium", "assignee": "Gal Daich", "reporter": "Gal Daich", "created": "2025-11-19T18:03:28.345+0200", "updated": "2026-02-05T16:09:23.772+0200", "createdDate": "11/19/2025", "updatedDate": "2/5/2026", "daysOpen": 151, "description": "🐛 Bug: HTML to Markdown Conversion Producing Oversized Output Causing Agent CrashesType: Bug FixComponent: web-crawler-serviceProblem DescriptionThe html_to_md_handler function was converting HTML pages to Markdown without any content filtering, resulting in excessively large Markdown files. This caused downstream agents processing this data to crash due to prompt length limitations.The HTML content included:
